Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Bardic Inspiration: R60' Can use a bonus action 2 times per long rest to give an ally +1d6 on an ability check, attack, or save within 1 hr
Divine Spark: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to restore 1d8 hit points or to inflict 1d8 HP of a choice of necrotic or radiant (save Constitution half)
Savage Attacker: Can take the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Turn Undead: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to make undead flee (save DC 15 Wisdom negates) for 1 min or until damaged
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds the ability modifier to the damage from a second weapon attack with a Light weapon
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 4 chosen kinds of proficient weapons
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution; Dexterity; Intelligence; Strength; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +7; Constitution: +7; Dexterity: +9; Intelligence: +8; Strength: +7; Wisdom: +7

Spells:
Acid Splash (S0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) in a 5' radius
Acid Splash (W0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) in a 5' radius
Aid (B2 Abju): (Action) R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr (+Level gives +5 hit points)
Aid (C2 Abju): (Action) R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr (+Level gives +5 hit points)
Aid (D2 Abju): (Action) R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr (+Level gives +5 hit points)
Aid (P2 Abju): (Action) R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr (+Level gives +5 hit points)
Aid (R2 Abju): (Action) R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr (+Level gives +5 hit points)
Alarm (R1 Abju): (Minute) R30' Entry into a 20' cube by a non-designated creature triggers an audible or mental alarm for 8 hr [R]
Alarm (W1 Abju): (Minute) R30' Entry into a 20' cube by a non-designated creature triggers an audible or mental alarm for 8 hr [R]
Alter Self (S2 Tran): (Action) Self becomes aquatic, changes appearance, or gains natural weapons with +7 attack and 1d6+2 HP damage, for concentration up to 1 hr
Alter Self (W2 Tran): (Action) Self becomes aquatic, changes appearance, or gains natural weapons with +8 attack and 1d6+3 HP damage, for concentration up to 1 hr
Animal Friendship (B1 Ench): (Action) R30' Charms a target beast (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target)
Animal Friendship (D1 Ench): (Action) R30' Charms a target beast (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target)
Animal Friendship (R1 Ench): (Action) R30' Charms a target beast (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target)
Animal Messenger (B2 Ench): (Action) R30' Tiny beast target moves to deliver a 25-word message to a described recipient (save Charisma negates; CR greater than 0 automatically succeeds) for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration +48 hr) [R]
Animal Messenger (D2 Ench): (Action) R30' Tiny beast target moves to deliver a 25-word message to a described recipient (save Charisma negates; CR greater than 0 automatically succeeds) for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration +48 hr) [R]
Animal Messenger (R2 Ench): (Action) R30' Tiny beast target moves to deliver a 25-word message to a described recipient (save Charisma negates; CR greater than 0 automatically succeeds) for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration +48 hr) [R]
Animal Shapes (D8 Tran): (Action) R30' Willing targets become CR 4, Large or smaller beasts, gaining temporary hit points appropriate to the beasts, for 24 hr or until ended by each target
Animate Dead (C3 Necr): (Minute) R10' Bones or the corpse of a Medium or Small humanoid becomes a skeleton or zombie that obeys commands when within 60' for 24 hr (+Level animates +2 undead)
Animate Dead (W3 Necr): (Minute) R10' Bones or the corpse of a Medium or Small humanoid becomes a skeleton or zombie that obeys commands when within 60' for 24 hr (+Level animates +2 undead)
Animate Objects (B5 Tran): (Action) R120' 2 Medium (10 hit points; Armor Class 15; +2 attack inflicts 1d4+3 force), 1 Large (20 hit points; Armor Class 15; +2 attack inflicts 2d6+5 HP), or 0 Huge (40 hit points, Armor Class 15; +2 attack inflicts 2d12+5 HP) objects obey mental commands when within 500' for concentration up to 1 min (+Level Medium objects inflict +1d4 HP, Large +1d6 HP, or Huge +1d12 HP)
Animate Objects (S5 Tran): (Action) R120' 2 Medium (10 hit points; Armor Class 15; +2 attack inflicts 1d4+3 force), 1 Large (20 hit points; Armor Class 15; +2 attack inflicts 2d6+5 HP), or 0 Huge (40 hit points, Armor Class 15; +2 attack inflicts 2d12+5 HP) objects obey mental commands when within 500' for concentration up to 1 min (+Level Medium objects inflict +1d4 HP, Large +1d6 HP, or Huge +1d12 HP)
Animate Objects (W5 Tran): (Action) R120' 3 Medium (10 hit points; Armor Class 15; +3 attack inflicts 1d4+3 force), 1 Large (20 hit points; Armor Class 15; +3 attack inflicts 2d6+6 HP), or 1 Huge (40 hit points, Armor Class 15; +3 attack inflicts 2d12+6 HP) objects obey mental commands when within 500' for concentration up to 1 min (+Level Medium objects inflict +1d4 HP, Large +1d6 HP, or Huge +1d12 HP)
Antilife Shell (D5 Abju): (Action) 10' radius prevents the passage of living creatures for concentration up to 1 hr
Antimagic Field (C8 Abju): (Action) 10' radius suppresses magic for concentration up to 1 hr
Antimagic Field (W8 Abju): (Action) 10' radius suppresses magic for concentration up to 1 hr
Antipathy/Sympathy (B8 Ench): (Hour) R60' Target creature or object charms or frightens a specified creature type within 120' (save Wisdom negates; additional saves when no longer within 120', or when an charmed creature is harmed, end the effect and give immunity for 1 min) for 10 days
Antipathy/Sympathy (D8 Ench): (Hour) R60' Target creature or object charms or frightens a specified creature type within 120' (save Wisdom negates; additional saves when no longer within 120', or when an charmed creature is harmed, end the effect and give immunity for 1 min) for 10 days
Antipathy/Sympathy (W8 Ench): (Hour) R60' Target creature or object charms or frightens a specified creature type within 120' (save Wisdom negates; additional saves when no longer within 120', or when an charmed creature is harmed, end the effect and give immunity for 1 min) for 10 days
Arcane Eye (W4 Divi): (Action) R30' Self sees with Darkvision through a remote invisible eye that can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 hr
Arcane Gate (K6 Conj): (Action) Creates one portal within 10' and another within 500' that can teleport creatures between them for concentration up to 10 min
Arcane Gate (S6 Conj): (Action) Creates one portal within 10' and another within 500' that can teleport creatures between them for concentration up to 10 min
Arcane Gate (W6 Conj): (Action) Creates one portal within 10' and another within 500' that can teleport creatures between them for concentration up to 10 min
Arcane Lock (W2 Abju): (Action) Touched barrier opens only for designated creatures or a specified password
Arcane Vigor (S2 Abju): (Bonus) Allows expending 1 or 2 Hit Dice to regain hit points equal to the roll + 2 (+Level Allows expending +1 Hit Die)
Arcane Vigor (W2 Abju): (Bonus) Allows expending 1 or 2 Hit Dice to regain hit points equal to the roll + 3 (+Level Allows expending +1 Hit Die)
Armor Of Agathys (K1 Abju): (Action) Self gains 5 temporary hit points, and a successful attacker suffers 5 HP cold, for 1 hr or until the temporary hit points are lost (+Level gives +5 temporary hit points and inflicts +5 HP)
Arms Of Hadar (K1 Conj): (Action) 10' radius inflicts 2d6 HP necrotic and loss of reactions until the target's next turn (save Strength half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Astral Projection (C9 Necr): (Hour) R10' Self and 8 willing targets project to the Astral Plane
Astral Projection (K9 Necr): (Hour) R10' Self and 8 willing targets project to the Astral Plane
Astral Projection (W9 Necr): (Hour) R10' Self and 8 willing targets project to the Astral Plane
Augury (C2 Divi): (Minute) Reveals the weal or woe outcome of a proposed act up to 30 min in the future; additional uses before a long rest impose a cumulative 25% chance of receiving no response [R]
Augury (D2 Divi): (Minute) Reveals the weal or woe outcome of a proposed act up to 30 min in the future; additional uses before a long rest impose a cumulative 25% chance of receiving no response [R]
Augury (W2 Divi): (Minute) Reveals the weal or woe outcome of a proposed act up to 30 min in the future; additional uses before a long rest impose a cumulative 25% chance of receiving no response [R]
Aura Of Life (C4 Abju): (Action) 30' radius gives allies resistance to necrotic damage and immunity to maximum hit point reduction, and raises those with 0 hit points to 1 hit point, for concentration up to 10 min
Aura Of Life (P4 Abju): (Action) 30' radius gives allies resistance to necrotic damage and immunity to maximum hit point reduction, and raises those with 0 hit points to 1 hit point, for concentration up to 10 min
Aura Of Purity (C4 Abju): (Action) 30' radius gives self and allies resistance to poison damage and advantage on saves vs. conditions for concentration up to 10 min
Aura Of Purity (P4 Abju): (Action) 30' radius gives self and allies resistance to poison damage and advantage on saves vs. conditions for concentration up to 10 min
Aura Of Vitality (C3 Abju): (Action) R30' Self can restore 2d6 hit points to a target once per turn for concentration up to 1 min
Aura Of Vitality (D3 Abju): (Action) R30' Self can restore 2d6 hit points to a target once per turn for concentration up to 1 min
Aura Of Vitality (P3 Abju): (Action) R30' Self can restore 2d6 hit points to a target once per turn for concentration up to 1 min
Awaken (B5 Tran): (8 Hours) Touched beast or plant gains Intelligence 10, speech, and movement and becomes charmed for 30 days or until harmed
Awaken (D5 Tran): (8 Hours) Touched beast or plant gains Intelligence 10, speech, and movement and becomes charmed for 30 days or until harmed
Bane (B1 Ench): (Action) R30' 3 targets suffer -1d4 on attacks and saves (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Bane (C1 Ench): (Action) R30' 3 targets suffer -1d4 on attacks and saves (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Bane (K1 Ench): (Action) R30' 3 targets suffer -1d4 on attacks and saves (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Banishing Smite (P5 Conj): (Bonus) Cast after a successful melee attack, inflicts +5d10 HP force, plus banishment for concentration up to 1 min to a demiplane if the attack reduces the target below 51 hit points (save Charisma negates banishment)
Banishment (C4 Abju): (Action) R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min (+Level affects +1 target)
Banishment (K4 Abju): (Action) R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min (+Level affects +1 target)
Banishment (P4 Abju): (Action) R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min (+Level affects +1 target)
Banishment (S4 Abju): (Action) R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min (+Level affects +1 target)
Banishment (W4 Abju): (Action) R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min (+Level affects +1 target)
Barkskin (D2 Tran): (Action) Willing touched gains Armor Class 17 for 1 hr
Barkskin (R2 Tran): (Action) Willing touched gains Armor Class 17 for 1 hr
Beacon Of Hope (C3 Abju): (Action) R30' Targets gain advantage on Wisdom and death saves and regain maximum hit points from healing for concentration up to 1 min
Beast Sense (D2 Divi): (Action) Self can perceive through a touched willing beast's senses for concentration up to 1 hr [R]
Beast Sense (R2 Divi): (Action) Self can perceive through a touched willing beast's senses for concentration up to 1 hr [R]
Befuddlement (B8 Ench): (Action) R150' Target suffers 10d6 HP psychic and loss of spells and Magic actions (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves every 30 days end)
Befuddlement (D8 Ench): (Action) R150' Target suffers 10d6 HP psychic and loss of spells and Magic actions (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves every 30 days end)
Befuddlement (K8 Ench): (Action) R150' Target suffers 10d6 HP psychic and loss of spells and Magic actions (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves every 30 days end)
Befuddlement (W8 Ench): (Action) R150' Target suffers 10d6 HP psychic and loss of spells and Magic actions (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves every 30 days end)
Bestow Curse (B3 Necr): (Action) Touched suffers a choice of disadvantage on specified ability rolls, disadvantage on attacks on self, requiring a successful Wisdom save to take any action other than Dodge, or +1d8 HP necrotic from self attacks (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the maximum duration to 10 min, 8 hr, 24 hr, or permanent at level 4, 5, 7, or 9; levels above 4 require no concentration)
Bestow Curse (C3 Necr): (Action) Touched suffers a choice of disadvantage on specified ability rolls, disadvantage on attacks on self, requiring a successful Wisdom save to take any action other than Dodge, or +1d8 HP necrotic from self attacks (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the maximum duration to 10 min, 8 hr, 24 hr, or permanent at level 4, 5, 7, or 9; levels above 4 require no concentration)
Bestow Curse (W3 Necr): (Action) Touched suffers a choice of disadvantage on specified ability rolls, disadvantage on attacks on self, requiring a successful Wisdom save to take any action other than Dodge, or +1d8 HP necrotic from self attacks (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the maximum duration to 10 min, 8 hr, 24 hr, or permanent at level 4, 5, 7, or 9; levels above 4 require no concentration)
Bigby's Hand (S5 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates a large force hand (Armor Class 20; 96 hit points) for concentration up to 1 min; can use bonus actions to move it 60' and punch (inflicts 5d8 HP force), push 15' (save Strength negates), grapple (may crush, inflicting 4d6+2 HP bludgeoning), or provide 1/2 cover and inflict difficult terrain (+Level inflicts +2d8 HP force and +2d6 HP bludgeoning)
Bigby's Hand (W5 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates a large force hand (Armor Class 20; 96 hit points) for concentration up to 1 min; can use bonus actions to move it 60' and punch (inflicts 5d8 HP force), push 20' (save Strength negates), grapple (may crush, inflicting 4d6+3 HP bludgeoning), or provide 1/2 cover and inflict difficult terrain (+Level inflicts +2d8 HP force and +2d6 HP bludgeoning)
Blade Barrier (C6 Evoc): (Action) R90' Creates a 100'x20'x5' blade wall or a 60'x20'x5' blade ring that provides 3/4 cover and inflicts 6d10 HP force (save Dexterity half) for concentration up to 10 min

Blink (W3 Tran): (Action) Self has a 50% chance of becoming ethereal at the end of each turn, returning to a choice of spot within 10' at the start of the next turn, for 1 min
Blur (S2 Illu): (Action) Foes suffer disadvantage when using sight to attack self for concentration up to 1 min
Blur (W2 Illu): (Action) Foes suffer disadvantage when using sight to attack self for concentration up to 1 min
