Charm Person (W1 Ench): (Action) R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage) for 1 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target)
Chill Touch (K0 Necr): (Action) Touch inflicts 3d10 HP necrotic, and the target cannot regain hit points until the end of the next turn
Chill Touch (S0 Necr): (Action) Touch inflicts 3d10 HP necrotic, and the target cannot regain hit points until the end of the next turn
Chill Touch (W0 Necr): (Action) Touch inflicts 3d10 HP necrotic, and the target cannot regain hit points until the end of the next turn
Chromatic Orb (S1 Evoc): (Action) R90' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder; rolling the same number on 2 damage dice indicates that the spell leaps to attack another target within 30' of the first (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP and can leap +1 time)
Chromatic Orb (W1 Evoc): (Action) R90' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder; rolling the same number on 2 damage dice indicates that the spell leaps to attack another target within 30' of the first (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP and can leap +1 time)
Circle Of Death (K6 Necr): (Action) R150' 60' radius inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +2d8 HP)
Circle Of Death (S6 Necr): (Action) R150' 60' radius inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +2d8 HP)
Circle Of Death (W6 Necr): (Action) R150' 60' radius inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +2d8 HP)
Circle Of Power (C5 Abju): (Action) Allies in a 30' radius have advantage on saves vs. magic, and successful saves vs. magic yield no damage instead of half, for concentration up to 10 min
Circle Of Power (P5 Abju): (Action) Allies in a 30' radius have advantage on saves vs. magic, and successful saves vs. magic yield no damage instead of half, for concentration up to 10 min
Circle Of Power (W5 Abju): (Action) Allies in a 30' radius have advantage on saves vs. magic, and successful saves vs. magic yield no damage instead of half, for concentration up to 10 min
Clairvoyance (B3 Divi): (10 Minutes) R1 mile Self can choose each turn to see or hear in a familiar or obvious location via an invisible sensor for concentration up to 10 min
Clairvoyance (C3 Divi): (10 Minutes) R1 mile Self can choose each turn to see or hear in a familiar or obvious location via an invisible sensor for concentration up to 10 min
Clairvoyance (S3 Divi): (10 Minutes) R1 mile Self can choose each turn to see or hear in a familiar or obvious location via an invisible sensor for concentration up to 10 min
Clairvoyance (W3 Divi): (10 Minutes) R1 mile Self can choose each turn to see or hear in a familiar or obvious location via an invisible sensor for concentration up to 10 min
Clone (W8 Necr): (Hour) 120-day process grows a backup body for the touched target
Cloud Of Daggers (B2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' cube inflicts 4d4 HP slashing for concentration up to 1 min; can use an action to move the effects 30' each turn (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP)
Cloud Of Daggers (K2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' cube inflicts 4d4 HP slashing for concentration up to 1 min; can use an action to move the effects 30' each turn (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP)
Cloud Of Daggers (S2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' cube inflicts 4d4 HP slashing for concentration up to 1 min; can use an action to move the effects 30' each turn (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP)
Cloud Of Daggers (W2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' cube inflicts 4d4 HP slashing for concentration up to 1 min; can use an action to move the effects 30' each turn (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP)
Cloudkill (S5 Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, inflicts 5d8 HP poison (save Constitution half), and moves away 10' at the start of each turn for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Cloudkill (W5 Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, inflicts 5d8 HP poison (save Constitution half), and moves away 10' at the start of each turn for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Color Spray (B1 Illu): (Action) 15' cone inflicts blinded (save Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn
Color Spray (S1 Illu): (Action) 15' cone inflicts blinded (save Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn
Color Spray (W1 Illu): (Action) 15' cone inflicts blinded (save Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn
Command (B1 Ench): (Action) R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self on its next turn (save Wisdom negates) (+Level affects +1 target)
Command (C1 Ench): (Action) R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self on its next turn (save Wisdom negates) (+Level affects +1 target)
Command (K1 [The Fiend] Ench): (Action) R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self on its next turn (save Wisdom negates) (+Level affects +1 target)
Command (P1 Ench): (Action) R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self on its next turn (save Wisdom negates) (+Level affects +1 target)
Commune (C5 Divi): (Minute) Deity answers 3 yes/no questions asked within 1 min; additional uses before a long rest inflict a cumulative 25% chance of failure [R]
Commune With Nature (D5 Divi): (Minute) Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Commune With Nature (R5 Divi): (Minute) Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Compelled Duel (P1 Ench): (Bonus) R30' Target stays within 30' of self (save Wisdom negates) and suffers disadvantage on attacks on others for concentration up to 1 min; self attacking another or a successful attack on the target by an ally ends
Comprehend Languages (B1 Divi): (Action) Self understands all languages for 1 hr [R]
Comprehend Languages (K1 Divi): (Action) Self understands all languages for 1 hr [R]
Comprehend Languages (S1 Divi): (Action) Self understands all languages for 1 hr [R]
Comprehend Languages (W1 Divi): (Action) Self understands all languages for 1 hr [R]
Compulsion (B4 Ench): (Action) R30' Self controls targets' movement direction (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Cone Of Cold (D5 Evoc): (Action) 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Cone Of Cold (S5 Evoc): (Action) 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Cone Of Cold (W5 Evoc): (Action) 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Confusion (B4 Ench): (Action) R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases the radius by 5')
Confusion (D4 Ench): (Action) R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases the radius by 5')
Confusion (S4 Ench): (Action) R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases the radius by 5')
Confusion (W4 Ench): (Action) R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases the radius by 5')
Conjure Animals (D3 Conj): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts on targets 3d10 HP slashing (save Dexterity negates), and 5' radius gives self advantage on Strength saves, for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Conjure Animals (R3 Conj): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts on targets 3d10 HP slashing (save Dexterity negates), and 5' radius gives self advantage on Strength saves, for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Conjure Barrage (R3 Conj): (Action) 60' cone inflicts 5d8 HP force (save Dexterity half) (+Level Inflicts +1d8 HP)
Conjure Celestial (C7 Conj): (Minute) R90' 10' radius either restores 4d12+2 hit points or inflicts 6d12 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) on each target for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn (+Level restores or inflicts +1d12 hit points)
Conjure Elemental (D5 Conj): (Minute) R60' 5' radius restrains a target, inflicting 8d8 HP of a choice of lightning, thunder, fire, or cold (save Dexterity negates; additional saves each rd end), then inflicts an additional 4d8 HP each subsequent rd, for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Conjure Elemental (W5 Conj): (Minute) R60' 5' radius restrains a target, inflicting 8d8 HP of a choice of lightning, thunder, fire, or cold (save Dexterity negates; additional saves each rd end), then inflicts an additional 4d8 HP each subsequent rd, for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Conjure Fey (D6 Conj): (Minute) R60' Melee spell attacks by a summoned spirit inflict 3d12+2 HP psychic and frightened until the start of the next turn for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn as a bonus action (+Level inflicts +1d12 HP)
Conjure Minor Elementals (D4 Conj): (Minute) 15' emanation inflicts difficult terrain on foes, and self attacks within it inflict +2d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, or lightning, for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +2d8 HP)
Conjure Minor Elementals (W4 Conj): (Minute) 15' emanation inflicts difficult terrain on foes, and self attacks within it inflict +2d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, or lightning, for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +2d8 HP)
Conjure Volley (R5 Conj): (Action) R150' 40' radius inflicts on targets 8d8 HP force (save Dexterity half)
Conjure Woodland Beings (D4 Conj): (Action) 10' emanation inflicts on targets 5d8 HP force (save Wisdom half) and allows self to use a bonus action to Disengage for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Conjure Woodland Beings (R4 Conj): (Action) 10' emanation inflicts on targets 5d8 HP force (save Wisdom half) and allows self to use a bonus action to Disengage for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Contact Other Plane (K5 Divi): (Minute) Contact with an extraplanar being inflicts 6d6 HP psychic and incapacitated on self until a long rest (save DC 15 Intelligence negates and gives one-word answers to 5 questions) [R]
Contact Other Plane (W5 Divi): (Minute) Contact with an extraplanar being inflicts 6d6 HP psychic and incapacitated on self until a long rest (save DC 15 Intelligence negates and gives one-word answers to 5 questions) [R]
Contagion (C5 Necr): (Action) Touch inflicts 11d8 HP necrotic, poisoned, and disadvantage on chosen ability saves (save Constitution negates; subsequent saves each rd either end after three successes or extend to 7 days after 3 failures; other effects that would end poisoned require a successful Constitution save to succeed)
Contagion (D5 Necr): (Action) Touch inflicts 11d8 HP necrotic, poisoned, and disadvantage on chosen ability saves (save Constitution negates; subsequent saves each rd either end after three successes or extend to 7 days after 3 failures; other effects that would end poisoned require a successful Constitution save to succeed)
Contingency (W6 Abju): (10 Minutes) Sets a trigger for a spell of level 5 or lower to affect self within 10 days
Continual Flame (C2 Evoc): (Action) Touched emits a heatless torch flame
Continual Flame (D2 Evoc): (Action) Touched emits a heatless torch flame
Continual Flame (W2 Evoc): (Action) Touched emits a heatless torch flame
Control Water (C4 Tran): (Action) R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Control Water (D4 Tran): (Action) R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Control Water (W4 Tran): (Action) R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Control Weather (C8 Tran): (10 Minutes) Adjusts the temperature, wind, and precipitation in a 5 mile radius after a 1d4 x 10 min delay for concentration up to 8 hr
Control Weather (D8 Tran): (10 Minutes) Adjusts the temperature, wind, and precipitation in a 5 mile radius after a 1d4 x 10 min delay for concentration up to 8 hr
Control Weather (W8 Tran): (10 Minutes) Adjusts the temperature, wind, and precipitation in a 5 mile radius after a 1d4 x 10 min delay for concentration up to 8 hr
Cordon Of Arrows (R2 Tran): (Action) Four planted arrows or bolts attack non-designated creatures within 30', inflicting 2d4 HP piercing each (save Dexterity negates), for 8 hr (+Level affects +2 pieces)
Counterspell (K3 Abju): (Reaction) R60' Negates foe casting (save Constitution negates)
Counterspell (S3 Abju): (Reaction) R60' Negates foe casting (save Constitution negates)
Counterspell (W3 Abju): (Reaction) R60' Negates foe casting (save Constitution negates)
Create Food And Water (C3 Conj): (Action) R30' Creates 45 lb of food that lasts for 24 hr and 30 gallons of water
Create Food And Water (P3 Conj): (Action) R30' Creates 45 lb of food that lasts for 24 hr and 30 gallons of water
Create Or Destroy Water (C1 Tran): (Action) R30' Creates or destroys 10 gallons of water or fog in a 30' cube (+Level affects +10 gallons or a +5' cube)
Create Or Destroy Water (D1 Tran): (Action) R30' Creates or destroys 10 gallons of water or fog in a 30' cube (+Level affects +10 gallons or a +5' cube)
Create Undead (C6 Necr): (Minute) R10' 3 corpses become ghouls that obey commands within 120' for 24 hr; additional castings extend the duration for 24 hr (+Level creates 4 ghouls; 5 ghouls, 2 ghasts, or 2 wights; or 6 ghouls, 3 ghasts, 3 wights, or 2 mummies at level 7, 8, or 9)
Create Undead (K6 Necr): (Minute) R10' 3 corpses become ghouls that obey commands within 120' for 24 hr; additional castings extend the duration for 24 hr (+Level creates 4 ghouls; 5 ghouls, 2 ghasts, or 2 wights; or 6 ghouls, 3 ghasts, 3 wights, or 2 mummies at level 7, 8, or 9)
Create Undead (W6 Necr): (Minute) R10' 3 corpses become ghouls that obey commands within 120' for 24 hr; additional castings extend the duration for 24 hr (+Level creates 4 ghouls; 5 ghouls, 2 ghasts, or 2 wights; or 6 ghouls, 3 ghasts, 3 wights, or 2 mummies at level 7, 8, or 9)
Creation (S5 Illu): (Minute) R30' Creates a 5' cube of false matter lasting 24 hr (vegetable matter), 12 hr (stone or crystal), 1 hr (precious metals), 10 min (gems), or 1 min (adamantine or mithral) (+Level creates a +5' cube)
Creation (W5 Illu): (Minute) R30' Creates a 5' cube of false matter lasting 24 hr (vegetable matter), 12 hr (stone or crystal), 1 hr (precious metals), 10 min (gems), or 1 min (adamantine or mithral) (+Level creates a +5' cube)
Crown Of Madness (B2 Ench): (Action) R120' Self can direct the target humanoid's attacks (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Crown Of Madness (K2 Ench): (Action) R120' Self can direct the target humanoid's attacks (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Crown Of Madness (S2 Ench): (Action) R120' Self can direct the target humanoid's attacks (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Crown Of Madness (W2 Ench): (Action) R120' Self can direct the target humanoid's attacks (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Crusader's Mantle (P3 Evoc): (Action) Ally attacks within a 30' emanation inflict +1d4 HP radiant for concentration up to 1 min
Cure Wounds (B1 Abju): (Action) Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points (+Level restores +2d8 hit points)
Cure Wounds (C1 Abju): (Action) Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points (+Level restores +2d8 hit points)
Cure Wounds (D1 Abju): (Action) Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points (+Level restores +2d8 hit points)
Cure Wounds (P1 Abju): (Action) Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points (+Level restores +2d8 hit points)
Cure Wounds (R1 Abju): (Action) Touched regains 2d8+2 hit points (+Level restores +2d8 hit points)
Dancing Lights (B0 Illu): (Action) R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per turn as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Dancing Lights (S0 Illu): (Action) R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per turn as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Dancing Lights (W0 Illu): (Action) R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per turn as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Darkness (K2 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Darkness (S2 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Darkness (W2 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Darkvision (D2 Tran): (Action) Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Darkvision (R2 Tran): (Action) Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Darkvision (S2 Tran): (Action) Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Darkvision (W2 Tran): (Action) Willing touched sees 150' in darkness for 8 hr
Daylight (C3 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Daylight (D3 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Daylight (P3 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Daylight (R3 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Daylight (S3 Evoc): (Action) R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Death Ward (C4 Abju): (Action) Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Death Ward (P4 Abju): (Action) Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Delayed Blast Fireball (S7 Evoc): (Action) R150' Creates a bead that inflicts 12d6 HP fire + 1d6 HP fire per rd delayed (save Dexterity half) in a 20' radius when it is allowed to explode within concentration up to 1 min; a successful Reflex save allows picking up and throwing the bead 40', causing it to explode on contact (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Delayed Blast Fireball (W7 Evoc): (Action) R150' Creates a bead that inflicts 12d6 HP fire + 1d6 HP fire per rd delayed (save Dexterity half) in a 20' radius when it is allowed to explode within concentration up to 1 min; a successful Reflex save allows picking up and throwing the bead 40', causing it to explode on contact (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Demiplane (K8 Conj): (Action) R60' Creates a door that leads to a 30'x30'x30' extradimensional room for 1 hr
Demiplane (S8 Conj): (Action) R60' Creates a door that leads to a 30'x30'x30' extradimensional room for 1 hr
Demiplane (W8 Conj): (Action) R60' Creates a door that leads to a 30'x30'x30' extradimensional room for 1 hr
Destructive Wave (P5 Evoc): (Action) 30' radius inflicts 5d6 HP thunder, knocked prone, and 5d6 HP of a choice of radiant or necrotic (save Constitution half HP only) on targets
Detect Evil And Good (C1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals aberrations, celestials, elementals, feys, fiends, undead, and Hallow effects for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Detect Evil And Good (P1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals aberrations, celestials, elementals, feys, fiends, undead, and Hallow effects for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Detect Magic (B1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (C1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (D1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (K1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (P1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (R1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (S1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (W1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (C1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (D1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (P1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (R1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Thoughts (B2 Divi): (Action) R30' Detects the presence of minds or reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom negates; additional Arcana checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 1' of stone, dirt, or wood, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Detect Thoughts (S2 Divi): (Action) R30' Detects the presence of minds or reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom negates; additional Arcana checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 1' of stone, dirt, or wood, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Detect Thoughts (W2 Divi): (Action) R30' Detects the presence of minds or reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom negates; additional Arcana checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 1' of stone, dirt, or wood, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Dimension Door (B4 Conj): (Action) Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Dimension Door (K4 Conj): (Action) Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Dimension Door (S4 Conj): (Action) Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Dimension Door (W4 Conj): (Action) Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Disguise Self (B1 Illu): (Action) Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Disguise Self (S1 Illu): (Action) Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Disguise Self (W1 Illu): (Action) Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Disintegrate (S6 Tran): (Action) R60' Inflicts 10d6+40 HP force and turns the target to dust if reduced to 0 HP (save Dexterity negates), or disintegrates a Large or smaller object or magical force (+Level inflicts +3d6 HP)
Disintegrate (W6 Tran): (Action) R60' Inflicts 10d6+40 HP force and turns the target to dust if reduced to 0 HP (save Dexterity negates), or disintegrates a Large or smaller object or magical force (+Level inflicts +3d6 HP)
Dispel Evil And Good (C5 Abju): (Action) Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead suffer disadvantage on attacks vs. self for concentration up to 1 min; ending the spell early allows a successful spell attack on one of these creatures to return it to its home plane (save Charisma negates), or a touch to end an enchanted, frightened, or possessed condition inflicted by one of them
Dispel Evil And Good (P5 Abju): (Action) Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead suffer disadvantage on attacks vs. self for concentration up to 1 min; ending the spell early allows a successful spell attack on one of these creatures to return it to its home plane (save Charisma negates), or a touch to end an enchanted, frightened, or possessed condition inflicted by one of them
Dispel Magic (B3 Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Dispel Magic (C3 Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Dispel Magic (D3 Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Dispel Magic (K3 Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Dispel Magic (P3 Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Dispel Magic (R3 Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Dispel Magic (S3 Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Dispel Magic (W3 Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Dissonant Whispers (B1 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d6 HP psychic and forces the target to use its reaction to flee (save Wisdom half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Divination (C4 Divi): (Action) Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Divination (D4 Divi): (Action) Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Divination (W4 Divi): (Action) Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Divine Favor (P1 Tran): (Bonus) Self weapons inflict +1d4 HP radiant for 1 min
Divine Smite (P1 Evoc): (Bonus) Cast after a successful melee attack, inflicts +2d8 HP radiant, or +3d8 HP radiant on a fiend or undead (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Divine Smite (P1 [Paladin's Smite] Evoc): (Bonus) Cast after a successful melee attack, inflicts +2d8 HP radiant, or +3d8 HP radiant on a fiend or undead (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Divine Word (C7 Evoc): (Bonus) R30' Inflicts death on targets with up to 20 HP, blinded, deafened, and stunned for 1 hr on those with up to 30 HP, blinded and deafened for 10 min on those with up to 40 HP, and deafened for 1 min on those with up to 50 HP, and forces celestials, elementals, fey, and fiends to return to their home planes (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr
Dominate Beast (D4 Ench): (Action) R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7)
Dominate Beast (R4 Ench): (Action) R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7)
Dominate Beast (S4 Ench): (Action) R60' Target beast obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 5, 6, or 7)
Dominate Monster (B8 Ench): (Action) R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level extends the duration to 8 hr)
Dominate Monster (K8 Ench): (Action) R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level extends the duration to 8 hr)
Dominate Monster (S8 Ench): (Action) R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level extends the duration to 8 hr)
Dominate Monster (W8 Ench): (Action) R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level extends the duration to 8 hr)
Dominate Person (B5 Ench): (Action) R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8)
Dominate Person (S5 Ench): (Action) R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8)
Dominate Person (W5 Ench): (Action) R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8)
Dragon's Breath (S2 Tran): (Bonus) Willing touched can use a Magic action to inflict 3d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison (save Dexterity half) in a 15' cone for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Dragon's Breath (W2 Tran): (Bonus) Willing touched can use a Magic action to inflict 3d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison (save Dexterity half) in a 15' cone for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Drawmij's Instant Summons (W6 Conj): (Minute) Prepares an item weighing up to 10 lb and up to 6' long to teleport to self when desired; if the item is held when summoned, the spell instead reveals the possessor [R]
Dream (B5 Illu): (Minute) Willing touched controls the dreams of a known target for 8 hr and can inflict 3d6 HP psychic and loss of the benefits of rest (save Wisdom negates)
Dream (K5 Illu): (Minute) Willing touched controls the dreams of a known target for 8 hr and can inflict 3d6 HP psychic and loss of the benefits of rest (save Wisdom negates)
Dream (W5 Illu): (Minute) Willing touched controls the dreams of a known target for 8 hr and can inflict 3d6 HP psychic and loss of the benefits of rest (save Wisdom negates)
Druidcraft (D0 Tran): (Action) R30' Predicts 24 hr weather, causes a plant to bloom, creates a minor sensory effect, or lights or snuffs a small fire
Earthquake (C8 Tran): (Action) R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Earthquake (D8 Tran): (Action) R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Earthquake (S8 Tran): (Action) R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Eldritch Blast (K0 Evoc): (Action) R120' Ranged spell creates 3 rays that inflict 1d10 HP force each
Elemental Weapon (D3 Tran): (Action) Touched weapon gains +1 attack and +1d4 HP damage of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level gives +2 or +3 attack and +2d4 or +3d4 damage at level 5 or 7)
Elemental Weapon (P3 Tran): (Action) Touched weapon gains +1 attack and +1d4 HP damage of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level gives +2 or +3 attack and +2d4 or +3d4 damage at level 5 or 7)
Elemental Weapon (R3 Tran): (Action) Touched weapon gains +1 attack and +1d4 HP damage of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level gives +2 or +3 attack and +2d4 or +3d4 damage at level 5 or 7)
Elementalism (D0 Tran): (Action) R30' Moves air or dust in a 5' cube, creates smoke or mist in a 5' cube for 1 min, or sculpts a 1' cube of dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water for 1 hr
Elementalism (S0 Tran): (Action) R30' Moves air or dust in a 5' cube, creates smoke or mist in a 5' cube for 1 min, or sculpts a 1' cube of dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water for 1 hr
Elementalism (W0 Tran): (Action) R30' Moves air or dust in a 5' cube, creates smoke or mist in a 5' cube for 1 min, or sculpts a 1' cube of dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water for 1 hr
Enhance Ability (B2 Tran): (Action) Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Enhance Ability (C2 Tran): (Action) Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Enhance Ability (D2 Tran): (Action) Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Enhance Ability (R2 Tran): (Action) Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Enhance Ability (S2 Tran): (Action) Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Enhance Ability (W2 Tran): (Action) Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Enlarge/Reduce (B2 Tran): (Action) R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Enlarge/Reduce (D2 Tran): (Action) R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Enlarge/Reduce (S2 Tran): (Action) R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Enlarge/Reduce (W2 Tran): (Action) R30' Target increases a size category, gaining advantage on Strength checks and +1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, or decreases a size category, suffering disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d4 HP weapon and unarmed damage, (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min; can instead target an unattended object
Ensnaring Strike (R1 Conj): (Bonus) Cast after a successful weapon attack, restrains the foe (save Strength negates; Large creatures have advantage on the save) and inflicts 1d6 HP per rd piercing (save Athletics each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Entangle (D1 Conj): (Action) R90' 20' sq inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Strength negates; additional Athletics checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Entangle (R1 Conj): (Action) R90' 20' sq inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Strength negates; additional Athletics checks each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Enthrall (B2 Ench): (Action) R60' Targets suffer -10 Perception (save Wisdom negates; targets in battle automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min
Enthrall (K2 Ench): (Action) R60' Targets suffer -10 Perception (save Wisdom negates; targets in battle automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min
Etherealness (B7 Conj): (Action) Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr (+Level affects +2 or +5 willing targets at level 8 or 9)
Etherealness (C7 Conj): (Action) Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr (+Level affects +2 or +5 willing targets at level 8 or 9)
Etherealness (K7 Conj): (Action) Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr (+Level affects +2 or +5 willing targets at level 8 or 9)
Etherealness (S7 Conj): (Action) Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr (+Level affects +2 or +5 willing targets at level 8 or 9)
Etherealness (W7 Conj): (Action) Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr (+Level affects +2 or +5 willing targets at level 8 or 9)
Evard's Black Tentacles (W4 Conj): (Action) R90' 20' sq inflicts difficult terrain, 3d6 HP bludgeoning, and restrained (save Strength negates, additional Athletics checks each rd break free) for concentration up to 1 min
Expeditious Retreat (K1 Tran): (Bonus) Allows self to Dash immediately and then to use a bonus action to Dash each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Expeditious Retreat (S1 Tran): (Bonus) Allows self to Dash immediately and then to use a bonus action to Dash each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Expeditious Retreat (W1 Tran): (Bonus) Allows self to Dash immediately and then to use a bonus action to Dash each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Eyebite (B6 Necr): (Action) R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Eyebite (K6 Necr): (Action) R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Eyebite (S6 Necr): (Action) R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Eyebite (W6 Necr): (Action) R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Fabricate (W4 Tran): (10 Minutes) R120' Reshapes raw material into a 10' cube product, or a 5' cube product of stone or metal
Faerie Fire (B1 Evoc): (Action) R60' Objects and creatures in a 20' cube glow (save Dexterity negates), giving their foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min
Faerie Fire (D1 Evoc): (Action) R60' Objects and creatures in a 20' cube glow (save Dexterity negates), giving their foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min
False Life (S1 Necr): (Action) Self gains 2d4+4 temporary hit points (+Level gives +5 temporary hit points)
False Life (W1 Necr): (Action) Self gains 2d4+4 temporary hit points (+Level gives +5 temporary hit points)
Fear (B3 Illu): (Action) Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd when out of sight of self end) for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (K3 Illu): (Action) Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd when out of sight of self end) for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (S3 Illu): (Action) Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd when out of sight of self end) for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (W3 Illu): (Action) Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd when out of sight of self end) for concentration up to 1 min
Feather Fall (B1 Tran): (Reaction) R60' Causes 5 falling targets to slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Feather Fall (S1 Tran): (Reaction) R60' Causes 5 falling targets to slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Feather Fall (W1 Tran): (Reaction) R60' Causes 5 falling targets to slow to 60' per rd for 1 min
Feign Death (B3 Necr): (Action) Touched appears dead and gains resistance to non-psychic damage for 1 hr [R]
Feign Death (C3 Necr): (Action) Touched appears dead and gains resistance to non-psychic damage for 1 hr [R]
Feign Death (D3 Necr): (Action) Touched appears dead and gains resistance to non-psychic damage for 1 hr [R]
Feign Death (W3 Necr): (Action) Touched appears dead and gains resistance to non-psychic damage for 1 hr [R]
Find Familiar (D1 [Wild Companion] Conj): (Hour) R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in animal form that allows telepathic communication, remote sensing, and use of its reaction to deliver remote touch attacks when within 100' [R]
Find Familiar (W1 Conj): (Hour) R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in animal form that allows telepathic communication, remote sensing, and use of its reaction to deliver remote touch attacks when within 100' [R]
Find Steed (P2 Conj): (10 Minutes) R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in steed form; it has an Intelligence of at least 6, Armor Class 12, 25 hit points, and 60' Speed, regains an equal number of hit points from magical healing applied to self when within 5', makes a +2 attack that inflicts 1d8+2 HP of radiant, psychic, or necrotic, depending on spirit type, can use a bonus action to frighten within 60', teleport 60', or heal 2d8+2 hit points within 5', depending on spirit type, and can communicate telepathically with self for 1 mile (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, damage by 1, and healing by 1; level 4 also gives a 60' fly Speed)
Find The Path (B6 Divi): (Minute) Reveals the shortest path to a specified familiar destination for concentration up to 1 day
Find The Path (C6 Divi): (Minute) Reveals the shortest path to a specified familiar destination for concentration up to 1 day
Find The Path (D6 Divi): (Minute) Reveals the shortest path to a specified familiar destination for concentration up to 1 day
Find Traps (C2 Divi): (Action) R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Find Traps (D2 Divi): (Action) R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Find Traps (R2 Divi): (Action) R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Finger Of Death (K7 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 7d8+30 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) and becomes an obedient zombie if killed
Finger Of Death (S7 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 7d8+30 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) and becomes an obedient zombie if killed
Finger Of Death (W7 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 7d8+30 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) and becomes an obedient zombie if killed
Fire Bolt (S0 Evoc): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 3d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Fire Bolt (W0 Evoc): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 3d10 HP fire or ignites an unattended flammable target
Fire Shield (D4 Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Shield (K4 [The Fiend] Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Shield (S4 Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Shield (W4 Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Storm (C7 Evoc): (Action) R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fire Storm (D7 Evoc): (Action) R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fire Storm (S7 Evoc): (Action) R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fireball (K3 [The Fiend] Evoc): (Action) R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Fireball (S3 Evoc): (Action) R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Fireball (W3 Evoc): (Action) R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Flame Blade (D2 Evoc): (Bonus) Self wields a flaming blade that inflicts 3d6+2 HP fire and emits a 10' bright light for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Flame Blade (S2 Evoc): (Bonus) Self wields a flaming blade that inflicts 3d6+2 HP fire and emits a 10' bright light for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Flame Strike (C5 Evoc): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts 5d6 HP fire and 5d6 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP fire and radiant)
Flame Strike (K5 [The Fiend] Evoc): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts 5d6 HP fire and 5d6 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP fire and radiant)
Flaming Sphere (D2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' sphere emits a 20' bright light, inflicts 2d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) on creatures within 5', and ignites unattended flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to move it 30', rolling over 5' barriers and jumping 10' gaps (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Flaming Sphere (S2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' sphere emits a 20' bright light, inflicts 2d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) on creatures within 5', and ignites unattended flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to move it 30', rolling over 5' barriers and jumping 10' gaps (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Flaming Sphere (W2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' sphere emits a 20' bright light, inflicts 2d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) on creatures within 5', and ignites unattended flammable objects for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each rd to move it 30', rolling over 5' barriers and jumping 10' gaps (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Flesh To Stone (D6 Tran): (Action) R60' Target becomes restrained (save Constitution negates), then petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates) for concentration; the effects become permanent after 1 min of concentration
Flesh To Stone (S6 Tran): (Action) R60' Target becomes restrained (save Constitution negates), then petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates) for concentration; the effects become permanent after 1 min of concentration
Flesh To Stone (W6 Tran): (Action) R60' Target becomes restrained (save Constitution negates), then petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates) for concentration; the effects become permanent after 1 min of concentration
Fly (K3 Tran): (Action) Touched gains a 60' fly Speed for concentration up to 10 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Fly (S3 Tran): (Action) Touched gains a 60' fly Speed for concentration up to 10 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Fly (W3 Tran): (Action) Touched gains a 60' fly Speed for concentration up to 10 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Fog Cloud (D1 Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the radius by 20')
Fog Cloud (R1 Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the radius by 20')
Fog Cloud (S1 Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the radius by 20')
Fog Cloud (W1 Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the radius by 20')
Forbiddance (C6 Abju): (10 Minutes) Touched 40,000 sq ft bars teleport and portals; entry inflicts 5d10 HP of a choice of radiant or necrotic to one or more choices of aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead (password negates) for 1 day; casting daily for 30 days makes the effects permanent [R]
Forcecage (B7 Evoc): (Action) R100' Creates a choice of a 20' barred force cube or a 10' solid force box that can trap creatures inside (save Charisma allows magical escape) for concentration up to 1 hr
Forcecage (K7 Evoc): (Action) R100' Creates a choice of a 20' barred force cube or a 10' solid force box that can trap creatures inside (save Charisma allows magical escape) for concentration up to 1 hr
Forcecage (W7 Evoc): (Action) R100' Creates a choice of a 20' barred force cube or a 10' solid force box that can trap creatures inside (save Charisma allows magical escape) for concentration up to 1 hr
Foresight (B9 Divi): (Minute) Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr or until cast again
Foresight (D9 Divi): (Minute) Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr or until cast again
Foresight (K9 Divi): (Minute) Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr or until cast again
Foresight (W9 Divi): (Minute) Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr or until cast again
Fount Of Moonlight (B4 Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 20' radius bright light, gains resistance to radiant, inflicts +2d6 HP radiant, and can use a reaction to inflict blindness on successful attackers until the end of the next turn (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 10 min
Fount Of Moonlight (D4 Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 20' radius bright light, gains resistance to radiant, inflicts +2d6 HP radiant, and can use a reaction to inflict blindness on successful attackers until the end of the next turn (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 10 min
Freedom Of Movement (B4 Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments, gains a 30' swim Speed, and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Freedom Of Movement (C4 Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments, gains a 30' swim Speed, and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Freedom Of Movement (D4 Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments, gains a 30' swim Speed, and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Freedom Of Movement (R4 Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments, gains a 30' swim Speed, and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Friends (B0 Ench): (Action) R10' Target humanoid becomes charmed (save Wisdom negates; creatures who are fighting self automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min, until damaged, or until self takes a hostile action toward any creature, once per target per 24 hr
Friends (K0 Ench): (Action) R10' Target humanoid becomes charmed (save Wisdom negates; creatures who are fighting self automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min, until damaged, or until self takes a hostile action toward any creature, once per target per 24 hr
Friends (S0 Ench): (Action) R10' Target humanoid becomes charmed (save Wisdom negates; creatures who are fighting self automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min, until damaged, or until self takes a hostile action toward any creature, once per target per 24 hr
Friends (W0 Ench): (Action) R10' Target humanoid becomes charmed (save Wisdom negates; creatures who are fighting self automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min, until damaged, or until self takes a hostile action toward any creature, once per target per 24 hr
Gaseous Form (K3 Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Gaseous Form (S3 Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Gaseous Form (W3 Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Gate (C9 Conj): (Action) R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Gate (K9 Conj): (Action) R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Gate (S9 Conj): (Action) R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Gate (W9 Conj): (Action) R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Geas (B5 Ench): (Minute) R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) each day for 30 days (+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9)
Geas (C5 Ench): (Minute) R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) each day for 30 days (+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9)
Geas (D5 Ench): (Minute) R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) each day for 30 days (+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9)
Geas (P5 Ench): (Minute) R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) each day for 30 days (+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9)
Geas (W5 Ench): (Minute) R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) each day for 30 days (+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9)
Gentle Repose (C2 Necr): (Action) Touched corpse becomes immune to decay and animation for 10 days [R]
Gentle Repose (P2 Necr): (Action) Touched corpse becomes immune to decay and animation for 10 days [R]
Gentle Repose (W2 Necr): (Action) Touched corpse becomes immune to decay and animation for 10 days [R]
Giant Insect (D4 Conj): (Action) R60' Summons a choice of an obedient giant centipede, spider, or wasp for concentration up to 10 min; it has Armor Class 15, 70 hit points, a 40' Speed and climb Speed, understanding of self languages, and 2 +2 attacks per rd that inflict 1d6+7 HP piercing and 1d4 HP poison; centipedes also have a R10' attack that inflicts poisoned (save Constitution negates) for 1 rd, spiders a range 60' attack that inflicts 1d10+7 bludgeoning and loss of movement for 1 rd, and wasps a 40' fly Speed (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, number of attacks by 1 per 2 levels, piercing damage by 1, and spider's bludgeoning damage by 1)
Glibness (B8 Ench): (Action) Self can take 15 on Charisma checks and always detects as truthful for 1 hr
Glibness (K8 Ench): (Action) Self can take 15 on Charisma checks and always detects as truthful for 1 hr
Globe Of Invulnerability (S6 Abju): (Action) 10' radius blocks spells of level 5 or lower for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases the level of spells blocked by 1)
Globe Of Invulnerability (W6 Abju): (Action) 10' radius blocks spells of level 5 or lower for concentration up to 1 min (+Level increases the level of spells blocked by 1)
Glyph Of Warding (B3 Abju): (Hour) When triggered, 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder (save Dexterity half), or a spell of up to level 3 (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP or increases the level of the triggered spell by 1)
Glyph Of Warding (C3 Abju): (Hour) When triggered, 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder (save Dexterity half), or a spell of up to level 3 (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP or increases the level of the triggered spell by 1)
Glyph Of Warding (W3 Abju): (Hour) When triggered, 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder (save Dexterity half), or a spell of up to level 3 (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP or increases the level of the triggered spell by 1)
Goodberry (D1 Conj): (Action) Creates 10 berries that last for 24 hr; each restores 1 hit point and provides nourishment for 1 day
Goodberry (R1 Conj): (Action) Creates 10 berries that last for 24 hr; each restores 1 hit point and provides nourishment for 1 day
Grasping Vine (D4 Conj): (Bonus) R60' 30' vine makes a melee spell attack each rd to inflict 4d8 HP bludgeoning, grapple, and pull the target 30' for concentration up to 1 min (+Level the vine can attack +1 target each rd)
Grasping Vine (R4 Conj): (Bonus) R60' 30' vine makes a melee spell attack each rd to inflict 4d8 HP bludgeoning, grapple, and pull the target 30' for concentration up to 1 min (+Level the vine can attack +1 target each rd)
Grease (S1 Conj): (Action) R60' 10' sq becomes difficult terrain and causes creatures to fall prone (save Dexterity negates) for 1 min
Grease (W1 Conj): (Action) R60' 10' sq becomes difficult terrain and causes creatures to fall prone (save Dexterity negates) for 1 min
Greater Invisibility (B4 Illu): (Action) Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Greater Invisibility (S4 Illu): (Action) Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Greater Invisibility (W4 Illu): (Action) Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Greater Restoration (B5 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Greater Restoration (C5 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Greater Restoration (D5 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Greater Restoration (P5 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Greater Restoration (R5 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Guardian Of Faith (C4 Conj): (Action) R30' 10' radius inflicts 20 HP radiant on foes (save Dexterity half) for 8 hr or until it has inflicted 60 HP
Guards And Wards (B6 Abju): (10 Minutes) Multiple magic effects protect a 2,500 sq ft area for 24 hr
Guards And Wards (W6 Abju): (10 Minutes) Multiple magic effects protect a 2,500 sq ft area for 24 hr
Guidance (C0 Divi): (Action) Willing touched gains +1d4 on a choice of skill for concentration up to 1 min
Guidance (D0 Divi): (Action) Willing touched gains +1d4 on a choice of skill for concentration up to 1 min
Guiding Bolt (C1 Evoc): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d6 HP radiant and gives advantage on the next attack on the target before the end of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Gust Of Wind (D2 Evoc): (Action) 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each turn to redirect the wind
Gust Of Wind (R2 Evoc): (Action) 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each turn to redirect the wind
Gust Of Wind (S2 Evoc): (Action) 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each turn to redirect the wind
Gust Of Wind (W2 Evoc): (Action) 60'x10' wind pushes 15' (save Strength negates), inflicts half movement, disperses gas and vapor, and extinguishes flames (50% chance for protected flames) for concentration up to 1 min; can use a bonus action each turn to redirect the wind
Hail Of Thorns (R1 Conj): (Bonus) Cast after a successful ranged weapon attack, inflicts 1d10 HP piercing in a 5' radius (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Hallow (C5 Evoc): (24 Hours) 60' radius becomes warded against one or more choices of aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and their effects and evokes a boon or bane effect
Hallow (K5 [The Fiend] Evoc): (24 Hours) 60' radius becomes warded against one or more choices of aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and their effects and evokes a boon or bane effect
Hallucinatory Terrain (B4 Illu): (10 Minutes) R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Hallucinatory Terrain (D4 Illu): (10 Minutes) R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Hallucinatory Terrain (K4 Illu): (10 Minutes) R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Hallucinatory Terrain (W4 Illu): (10 Minutes) R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Harm (C6 Necr): (Action) R60' Inflicts 14d6 HP necrotic and an equal maximum hit point reduction (save Constitution half HP only)
Haste (S3 Tran): (Action) R30' Willing target gains double Speed, +2 Armor Class, advantage on Dexterity saves, and an additional action to Attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Utilize each turn for concentration up to 1 min and suffers 1 rd of incapacitation afterward
Haste (W3 Tran): (Action) R30' Willing target gains double Speed, +2 Armor Class, advantage on Dexterity saves, and an additional action to Attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Utilize each turn for concentration up to 1 min and suffers 1 rd of incapacitation afterward
Heal (C6 Abju): (Action) R60' Target regains 70 hit points and recovers from blinded, deafened, and poisoned (+Level restores +10 hit points)
Heal (D6 Abju): (Action) R60' Target regains 70 hit points and recovers from blinded, deafened, and poisoned (+Level restores +10 hit points)
Healing Word (B1 Abju): (Bonus) R60' Target regains 2d4+2 hit points (+Level restores +2d4 hit points)
Healing Word (C1 Abju): (Bonus) R60' Target regains 2d4+2 hit points (+Level restores +2d4 hit points)
Healing Word (D1 Abju): (Bonus) R60' Target regains 2d4+2 hit points (+Level restores +2d4 hit points)
Heat Metal (B2 Tran): (Action) R60' Touching the target metal object inflicts 2d8 HP fire, forces dropping it if possible (save Constitution negates), and inflicts attack and ability check disadvantage until the start of the next turn if the object is not dropped; can use a bonus action each turn to repeat the effects for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Heat Metal (D2 Tran): (Action) R60' Touching the target metal object inflicts 2d8 HP fire, forces dropping it if possible (save Constitution negates), and inflicts attack and ability check disadvantage until the start of the next turn if the object is not dropped; can use a bonus action each turn to repeat the effects for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Hellish Rebuke (K1 Evoc): (Reaction) R60' Cast when taking damage, inflicts 2d10 HP fire on the attacker (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Heroes' Feast (B6 Conj): (10 Minutes) 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal gain resistance to poison, immunity to poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Heroes' Feast (C6 Conj): (10 Minutes) 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal gain resistance to poison, immunity to poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Heroes' Feast (D6 Conj): (10 Minutes) 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal gain resistance to poison, immunity to poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Heroism (B1 Ench): (Action) Willing touched gains immunity to frightened and 2 temporary hit points each rd for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Heroism (P1 Ench): (Action) Willing touched gains immunity to frightened and 2 temporary hit points each rd for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hex (K1 Ench): (Bonus) R90' Self attacks on the target inflict +1d6 HP necrotic, and the target has disadvantage on a chosen ability, for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level extends the duration to 4, 8, or 24 hr at level 2, 3 or 5)
Hold Monster (B5 Ench): (Action) R90' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hold Monster (K5 Ench): (Action) R90' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hold Monster (S5 Ench): (Action) R90' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hold Monster (W5 Ench): (Action) R90' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hold Person (B2 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hold Person (C2 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hold Person (D2 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hold Person (K2 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hold Person (S2 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Hold Person (W2 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Holy Aura (C8 Abju): (Action) Targets in a 30' radius gain advantage on saves, inflict disadvantage on attackers, and blind successful fiend and undead melee attackers (save Constitution negates) until the end of its next turn for concentration up to 1 min
Hunger Of Hadar (K3 Conj): (Action) R150' Creatures in a 20' radius suffer 2d6 HP cold at the start of their turns (no save) and 2d6 HP acid at the end of their turns (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Hunter's Mark (R1 Divi): (Bonus) R90' Self inflicts +1d6 HP force on the target and gains advantage on Perception and Survival to locate it for concentration up to 1 hr; can use a bonus action to move to a different target when the current target drops to 0 hit points (+Level extends the duration to 8 or 24 hr at level 3 or 5)
Hunter's Mark (R1 [Favored Enemy] Divi): (Bonus) R90' Self inflicts +1d6 HP force on the target and gains advantage on Perception and Survival to locate it for concentration up to 1 hr; can use a bonus action to move to a different target when the current target drops to 0 hit points (+Level extends the duration to 8 or 24 hr at level 3 or 5)
Hypnotic Pattern (B3 Illu): (Action) R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Hypnotic Pattern (K3 Illu): (Action) R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Hypnotic Pattern (S3 Illu): (Action) R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Hypnotic Pattern (W3 Illu): (Action) R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Ice Knife (D1 Conj): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates cold) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold)
Ice Knife (S1 Conj): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates cold) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold)
Ice Knife (W1 Conj): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 1d10 HP piercing on a hit and 2d6 HP cold in a 5' radius (save Dexterity negates cold) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP cold)
Ice Storm (D4 Evoc): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP bludgeoning)
Ice Storm (S4 Evoc): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP bludgeoning)
Ice Storm (W4 Evoc): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d10 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP bludgeoning)
Identify (B1 Divi): (Minute) Touch reveals the magic properties of an item or the spells affecting a creature [R]
Identify (W1 Divi): (Minute) Touch reveals the magic properties of an item or the spells affecting a creature [R]
Illusory Script (B1 Illu): (Minute) Alters the appearance of self writing on the target material, making its meaning clear only to specified creatures and those with Truesight, for 10 days [R]
Illusory Script (K1 Illu): (Minute) Alters the appearance of self writing on the target material, making its meaning clear only to specified creatures and those with Truesight, for 10 days [R]
Illusory Script (W1 Illu): (Minute) Alters the appearance of self writing on the target material, making its meaning clear only to specified creatures and those with Truesight, for 10 days [R]
Imprisonment (K9 Abju): (Minute) R30' Restrains the target in a chosen type of prison until a specified trigger occurs (save Wisdom negates and gives the target 24 hr immunity)
Imprisonment (W9 Abju): (Minute) R30' Restrains the target in a chosen type of prison until a specified trigger occurs (save Wisdom negates and gives the target 24 hr immunity)
Incendiary Cloud (D8 Conj): (Action) R150' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Incendiary Cloud (S8 Conj): (Action) R150' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Incendiary Cloud (W8 Conj): (Action) R150' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, inflicts 10d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half), and moves away 10' per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Inflict Wounds (C1 Necr): (Action) Touch inflicts 2d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Insect Plague (C5 Conj): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Insect Plague (D5 Conj): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Insect Plague (S5 Conj): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Invisibility (B2 Illu): (Action) Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends (+Level affects +1 target)
Invisibility (K2 Illu): (Action) Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends (+Level affects +1 target)
Invisibility (S2 Illu): (Action) Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends (+Level affects +1 target)
Invisibility (W2 Illu): (Action) Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends (+Level affects +1 target)
Jallarzi's Storm Of Radiance (K5 Evoc): (Action) R120' 10' radius prevents casting verbal spells and inflicts blinded, deafened, 2d10 HP radiant, and 2d10 HP thunder (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 radiant and thunder)
Jallarzi's Storm Of Radiance (W5 Evoc): (Action) R120' 10' radius prevents casting verbal spells and inflicts blinded, deafened, 2d10 HP radiant, and 2d10 HP thunder (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 radiant and thunder)
Jump (D1 Tran): (Action) Touched can spend 10' of movement to make a 30' jump for 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Jump (R1 Tran): (Action) Touched can spend 10' of movement to make a 30' jump for 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Jump (S1 Tran): (Action) Touched can spend 10' of movement to make a 30' jump for 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Jump (W1 Tran): (Action) Touched can spend 10' of movement to make a 30' jump for 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Knock (B2 Tran): (Action) R60' Unlocks, unsticks, or unbars the target or suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 min
Knock (S2 Tran): (Action) R60' Unlocks, unsticks, or unbars the target or suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 min
Knock (W2 Tran): (Action) R60' Unlocks, unsticks, or unbars the target or suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 min
Legend Lore (B5 Divi): (10 Minutes) Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Legend Lore (C5 Divi): (10 Minutes) Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Legend Lore (W5 Divi): (10 Minutes) Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Leomund's Secret Chest (W4 Conj): (Action) Self can move a touched 12 cubic ft chest to and from the Ethereal Plane for 60 days, after which there is a cumulative 5% chance per day of the spell ending
Leomund's Tiny Hut (B3 Evoc): (Minute) Creates a 10' radius dome, impassable by outside creatures and objects and by spells up to level 3, for 8 hr [R]
Leomund's Tiny Hut (W3 Evoc): (Minute) Creates a 10' radius dome, impassable by outside creatures and objects and by spells up to level 3, for 8 hr [R]
Lesser Restoration (B2 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lesser Restoration (C2 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lesser Restoration (D2 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lesser Restoration (P2 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lesser Restoration (R2 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Levitate (S2 Tran): (Action) R60' Target 500 lb object or creature rises 20' (save Constitution negates) and can be moved up or down 20' each turn for concentration up to 10 min
Levitate (W2 Tran): (Action) R60' Target 500 lb object or creature rises 20' (save Constitution negates) and can be moved up or down 20' each turn for concentration up to 10 min
Light (B0 Evoc): (Action) Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Light (C0 Evoc): (Action) Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Light (S0 Evoc): (Action) Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Light (W0 Evoc): (Action) Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Lightning Arrow (R3 Tran): (Bonus) Cast after making a ranged weapon attack, inflicts 4d8 HP lightning on the target (miss half) and 2d8 HP lightning in a 10' radius (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Lightning Bolt (S3 Evoc): (Action) 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Lightning Bolt (W3 Evoc): (Action) 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Locate Animals Or Plants (B2 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location within 5 miles of a specified kind of beast or plant [R]
Locate Animals Or Plants (D2 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location within 5 miles of a specified kind of beast or plant [R]
Locate Animals Or Plants (R2 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location within 5 miles of a specified kind of beast or plant [R]
Locate Creature (B4 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Creature (C4 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Creature (D4 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Creature (P4 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Creature (R4 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Creature (W4 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Object (B2 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Locate Object (C2 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Locate Object (D2 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
