Locate Object (W2 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Longstrider (B1 Tran): (Action) Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Longstrider (D1 Tran): (Action) Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Longstrider (R1 Tran): (Action) Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Longstrider (W1 Tran): (Action) Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Mage Armor (S1 Abju): (Action) Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Mage Armor (W1 Abju): (Action) Willing, unarmored touched gains Armor Class 13 + Dexterity modifier for 8 hr; the spell ends if the target dons armor
Mage Hand (B0 Conj): (Action) R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Mage Hand (K0 Conj): (Action) R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Mage Hand (S0 Conj): (Action) R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Mage Hand (W0 Conj): (Action) R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Magic Circle (C3 Abju): (Minute) R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr (+Level extends the duration +1 hr)
Magic Circle (K3 Abju): (Minute) R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr (+Level extends the duration +1 hr)
Magic Circle (P3 Abju): (Minute) R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr (+Level extends the duration +1 hr)
Magic Circle (W3 Abju): (Minute) R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr (+Level extends the duration +1 hr)
Magic Jar (W6 Necr): (Minute) R100' Moves self soul to a prepared jar from which it can possess a target's body and trap its soul in the jar (save Charisma negates for 24 hr)
Magic Missile (S1 Evoc): (Action) R120' 3 darts inflict 1d4+1 HP force each (+Level creates +1 dart)
Magic Missile (W1 Evoc): (Action) R120' 3 darts inflict 1d4+1 HP force each (+Level creates +1 dart)
Magic Mouth (B2 Illu): (Minute) R30' Target object speaks a 25-word message when triggered [R]
Magic Mouth (W2 Illu): (Minute) R30' Target object speaks a 25-word message when triggered [R]
Magic Weapon (P2 Tran): (Bonus) Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr (+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6)
Magic Weapon (R2 Tran): (Bonus) Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr (+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6)
Magic Weapon (S2 Tran): (Bonus) Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr (+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6)
Magic Weapon (W2 Tran): (Bonus) Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr (+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6)
Major Image (B3 Illu): (Action) R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (contact or Investigation detects) that can be changed and moved for concentration up to 10 min (+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4)
Major Image (K3 Illu): (Action) R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (contact or Investigation detects) that can be changed and moved for concentration up to 10 min (+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4)
Major Image (S3 Illu): (Action) R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (contact or Investigation detects) that can be changed and moved for concentration up to 10 min (+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4)
Major Image (W3 Illu): (Action) R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (contact or Investigation detects) that can be changed and moved for concentration up to 10 min (+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4)
Mass Cure Wounds (B5 Abju): (Action) R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+2 HP (+Level restores +1d8 HP)
Mass Cure Wounds (C5 Abju): (Action) R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+2 HP (+Level restores +1d8 HP)
Mass Cure Wounds (D5 Abju): (Action) R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+2 HP (+Level restores +1d8 HP)
Mass Heal (C9 Abju): (Action) R60' Targets regain 700 HP total and recover from blinded, deafened, and poisoned
Mass Healing Word (B3 Abju): (Bonus) R60' 6 targets regain 2d4+2 HP (+Level restores +1d4 HP)
Mass Healing Word (C3 Abju): (Bonus) R60' 6 targets regain 2d4+2 HP (+Level restores +1d4 HP)
Mass Suggestion (B6 Ench): (Action) R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9)
Mass Suggestion (S6 Ench): (Action) R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9)
Mass Suggestion (W6 Ench): (Action) R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9)
Maze (W8 Conj): (Action) R60' Sends the target to a labyrinthine demiplane (save DC 20 Investigation escapes) for concentration up to 10 min
Meld Into Stone (C3 Tran): (Action) Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP force, expulsion, and prone on self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Meld Into Stone (D3 Tran): (Action) Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP force, expulsion, and prone on self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Meld Into Stone (R3 Tran): (Action) Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP force, expulsion, and prone on self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Melf's Acid Arrow (W2 Evoc): (Action) R90' Ranged spell inflicts 4d4 HP acid, plus 2d4 HP at the end of the target's next turn (miss half initial HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d4 HP initial and secondary)
Mending (B0 Tran): (Minute) Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Mending (C0 Tran): (Minute) Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Mending (D0 Tran): (Minute) Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Mending (S0 Tran): (Minute) Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Mending (W0 Tran): (Minute) Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Message (B0 Tran): (Action) R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Message (D0 Tran): (Action) R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Message (S0 Tran): (Action) R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Message (W0 Tran): (Action) R120' Self and target can hold a whispered conversation for 1 rd; can be cast through objects, but 1' of wood, stone, or metal or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Meteor Swarm (S9 Evoc): (Action) R1 mile 4 40' radius areas each inflict 20d6 HP fire and 20d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Meteor Swarm (W9 Evoc): (Action) R1 mile 4 40' radius areas each inflict 20d6 HP fire and 20d6 HP bludgeoning (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Mind Blank (B8 Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to psychic damage, emotion and thought detection, divination, and charmed for 24 hr
Mind Blank (W8 Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to psychic damage, emotion and thought detection, divination, and charmed for 24 hr
Mind Sliver (K0 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d6 HP psychic and -1d4 on the target's next save before the end of the next turn (save Intelligence negates)
Mind Sliver (S0 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d6 HP psychic and -1d4 on the target's next save before the end of the next turn (save Intelligence negates)
Mind Sliver (W0 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d6 HP psychic and -1d4 on the target's next save before the end of the next turn (save Intelligence negates)
Mind Spike (K2 Divi): (Action) R120' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Mind Spike (S2 Divi): (Action) R120' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Mind Spike (W2 Divi): (Action) R120' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Minor Illusion (B0 Illu): (Action) R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min or until cast again
Minor Illusion (K0 Illu): (Action) R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min or until cast again
Minor Illusion (S0 Illu): (Action) R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min or until cast again
Minor Illusion (W0 Illu): (Action) R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min or until cast again
Mirage Arcane (B7 Illu): (10 Minutes) Creates 1 mile sq of illusionary terrain for 10 days
Mirage Arcane (D7 Illu): (10 Minutes) Creates 1 mile sq of illusionary terrain for 10 days
Mirage Arcane (W7 Illu): (10 Minutes) Creates 1 mile sq of illusionary terrain for 10 days
Mirror Image (B2 Illu): (Action) 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Mirror Image (K2 Illu): (Action) 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Mirror Image (S2 Illu): (Action) 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Mirror Image (W2 Illu): (Action) 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Mislead (B5 Illu): (Action) Makes self invisible and creates an illusory duplicate that can move 60' and share senses for concentration up to 1 hr; attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends the invisibility
Mislead (K5 Illu): (Action) Makes self invisible and creates an illusory duplicate that can move 60' and share senses for concentration up to 1 hr; attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends the invisibility
Mislead (W5 Illu): (Action) Makes self invisible and creates an illusory duplicate that can move 60' and share senses for concentration up to 1 hr; attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends the invisibility
Misty Step (K2 Conj): (Bonus) Teleports self 30'
Misty Step (S2 Conj): (Bonus) Teleports self 30'
Misty Step (W2 Conj): (Bonus) Teleports self 30'
Modify Memory (B5 Ench): (Action) R30' Incapacitates the target for concentration up to 1 min and allows changing the target's memory of a 10-min event from the past 24 hr (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage); damaging or additional casting on the target ends the spell (+Level changes the memory of an event from the past 7, 30, 365, or unlimited days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9)
Modify Memory (W5 Ench): (Action) R30' Incapacitates the target for concentration up to 1 min and allows changing the target's memory of a 10-min event from the past 24 hr (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage); damaging or additional casting on the target ends the spell (+Level changes the memory of an event from the past 7, 30, 365, or unlimited days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9)
Moonbeam (D2 Evoc): (Action) R120' 5' radius inflicts 2d10 HP radiant (save Constitution half; shapechangers revert form on failure) and can move 60' per rd for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Mordenkainen's Faithful Hound (W4 Conj): (Action) R30' Creates an invisible watchdog that barks at Small or larger intruders within 30' and attacks those within 5' (password negates), inflicting 4d8 HP force (Dexterity negates), for 8 hr
Mordenkainen's Magnificent Mansion (B7 Conj): (Minute) R300' Self and designated creatures can enter an extradimensional dwelling containing provisions for 100 people for 24 hr
Mordenkainen's Magnificent Mansion (W7 Conj): (Minute) R300' Self and designated creatures can enter an extradimensional dwelling containing provisions for 100 people for 24 hr
Mordenkainen's Private Sanctum (W4 Abju): (10 Minutes) R120' Protects up to 100' sq from choices of sound, vision, divination, teleportation, and planar travel for 24 hr; casting daily for 365 days makes the effects permanent (+Level increases the protected area by 100')
Mordenkainen's Sword (B7 Evoc): (Action) R90' Creates a force weapon that inflicts 4d12+2 HP force; can use bonus actions to move it 30' and attack for concentration up to 1 min
Mordenkainen's Sword (W7 Evoc): (Action) R90' Creates a force weapon that inflicts 4d12+3 HP force; can use bonus actions to move it 30' and attack for concentration up to 1 min
Move Earth (D6 Tran): (Action) R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 min for concentration up to 2 hr
Move Earth (S6 Tran): (Action) R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 min for concentration up to 2 hr
Move Earth (W6 Tran): (Action) R120' Reshapes a 40' cube of earth each 10 min for concentration up to 2 hr
Nondetection (B3 Abju): (Action) Willing touched or touched 10'-long object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Nondetection (R3 Abju): (Action) Willing touched or touched 10'-long object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Nondetection (W3 Abju): (Action) Willing touched or touched 10'-long object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Nystul's Magic Aura (W2 Illu): (Action) Magic cast on the target object or willing creature reports false auras and takes effect as a different creature type for 24 hr; casting every day for 30 days makes the effects permanent
Otiluke's Freezing Sphere (S6 Evoc): (Action) R300' 60' radius inflicts 10d6 HP cold (save Constitution half) and freezes water for 1 min; effects can be placed into a globe that can be thrown 40' within 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Otiluke's Freezing Sphere (W6 Evoc): (Action) R300' 60' radius inflicts 10d6 HP cold (save Constitution half) and freezes water for 1 min; effects can be placed into a globe that can be thrown 40' within 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Otiluke's Resilient Sphere (W4 Abju): (Action) R30' Traps the target in an impervious sphere (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Otto's Irresistible Dance (B6 Ench): (Action) R30' Target dances in place, suffering disadvantage on Dexterity and attacks, and foes gain advantage on attacks (save Wisdom ends after 1 rd; additional saves each rd end), for concentration up to 1 min
Otto's Irresistible Dance (W6 Ench): (Action) R30' Target dances in place, suffering disadvantage on Dexterity and attacks, and foes gain advantage on attacks (save Wisdom ends after 1 rd; additional saves each rd end), for concentration up to 1 min
Pass Without Trace (D2 Abju): (Action) Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Pass Without Trace (R2 Abju): (Action) Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Passwall (W5 Tran): (Action) R30' Creates a 5'x8'x20' passage through wood, plaster, or stone for 1 hr
Phantasmal Force (B2 Illu): (Action) R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Phantasmal Force (K2 [The Archfey] Illu): (Action) R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Phantasmal Force (K2 [The Great Old One] Illu): (Action) R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Phantasmal Force (S2 Illu): (Action) R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Phantasmal Force (W2 Illu): (Action) R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Phantasmal Killer (B4 Illu): (Action) R120' Target perceives a personal horror that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks and 4d10 HP psychic per rd (save Wisdom half initial HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Phantasmal Killer (W4 Illu): (Action) R120' Target perceives a personal horror that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks and 4d10 HP psychic per rd (save Wisdom half initial HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Phantom Steed (W3 Illu): (Minute) R30' Conjures a mount that can be ridden by a designated creature 100' per rd (13 MPH) for 1 hr or until damaged [R]
Planar Ally (C6 Conj): (10 Minutes) R60' Summons a servant of an otherworldly entity to bargain for aid
Planar Binding (B5 Abju): (Hour) R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9)
Planar Binding (C5 Abju): (Hour) R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9)
Planar Binding (D5 Abju): (Hour) R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9)
Planar Binding (K5 Abju): (Hour) R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9)
Planar Binding (W5 Abju): (Hour) R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9)
Plane Shift (C7 Conj): (Action) Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Plane Shift (D7 Conj): (Action) Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Plane Shift (K7 Conj): (Action) Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Plane Shift (S7 Conj): (Action) Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Plane Shift (W7 Conj): (Action) Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Plant Growth (B3 Tran): (Action) R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 365 days
Plant Growth (D3 Tran): (Action) R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 365 days
Plant Growth (R3 Tran): (Action) R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 365 days
Poison Spray (D0 Necr): (Action) R30' Ranged spell inflicts 3d12 HP poison
Poison Spray (K0 Necr): (Action) R30' Ranged spell inflicts 3d12 HP poison
Poison Spray (S0 Necr): (Action) R30' Ranged spell inflicts 3d12 HP poison
Poison Spray (W0 Necr): (Action) R30' Ranged spell inflicts 3d12 HP poison
Polymorph (B4 Tran): (Action) R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast (save Wisdom negates), with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
Polymorph (D4 Tran): (Action) R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast (save Wisdom negates), with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
Polymorph (S4 Tran): (Action) R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast (save Wisdom negates), with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
Polymorph (W4 Tran): (Action) R60' Transforms the target creature into a beast (save Wisdom negates), with temporary hit points appropriate to the beast, for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 temporary hit points
Power Word Fortify (B7 Ench): (Action) R60' Distributes 120 temporary hit points among 6 targets
Power Word Fortify (C7 Ench): (Action) R60' Distributes 120 temporary hit points among 6 targets
Power Word Heal (B9 Ench): (Action) R60' Target regains all hit points, recovers from charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, and stunned, and can use a reaction to stand from prone
Power Word Heal (C9 Ench): (Action) R60' Target regains all hit points, recovers from charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, and stunned, and can use a reaction to stand from prone
Power Word Kill (B9 Ench): (Action) R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Kill (K9 Ench): (Action) R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Kill (S9 Ench): (Action) R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Kill (W9 Ench): (Action) R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Stun (B8 Ench): (Action) R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Power Word Stun (K8 Ench): (Action) R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Power Word Stun (S8 Ench): (Action) R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Power Word Stun (W8 Ench): (Action) R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Prayer Of Healing (C2 Evoc): (10 Minutes) R30' 5 targets gain the benefits of a short rest and regain 2d8 hit points after 10 min of casting; additional castings have no effect on a target until it completes a long rest (+Level restores +1d8 hit points)
Prayer Of Healing (P2 Evoc): (10 Minutes) R30' 5 targets gain the benefits of a short rest and regain 2d8 hit points after 10 min of casting; additional castings have no effect on a target until it completes a long rest (+Level restores +1d8 hit points)
Prestidigitation (B0 Tran): (Action) R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prestidigitation (K0 Tran): (Action) R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prestidigitation (S0 Tran): (Action) R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prestidigitation (W0 Tran): (Action) R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Prismatic Spray (B7 Evoc): (Action) 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 12d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates and ends the blindness) at the start of the next turn; 2 of the preceding effects
Prismatic Spray (S7 Evoc): (Action) 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 12d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates and ends the blindness) at the start of the next turn; 2 of the preceding effects
Prismatic Spray (W7 Evoc): (Action) 60' cone randomly inflicts one of: 12d6 HP fire, acid, lightning, poison, or cold (save Dexterity half); restrained (save Dexterity negates) and petrified after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates); blinded (save Dexterity negates) and banished to another plane (save Wisdom negates and ends the blindness) at the start of the next turn; 2 of the preceding effects
Prismatic Wall (B9 Abju): (Action) R60' 90'x30'x1" wall or 15' radius sphere blocks ranged attacks and spells, emits 100' bright light, and blinds for 1 min non-designated creatures within 20' (save Constitution negates) for 10 min; creatures passing through suffer 12d6 HP each fire, acid, lightning, poison, and cold (save Dexterity half), restraint (save Dexterity negates) and petrification after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates), and blindness (save Dexterity negates) and banishment to another plane (save Wisdom negates and ends the blindness) at the start of the next turn
Prismatic Wall (W9 Abju): (Action) R60' 90'x30'x1" wall or 15' radius sphere blocks ranged attacks and spells, emits 100' bright light, and blinds for 1 min non-designated creatures within 20' (save Constitution negates) for 10 min; creatures passing through suffer 12d6 HP each fire, acid, lightning, poison, and cold (save Dexterity half), restraint (save Dexterity negates) and petrification after 3 failed Constitution saves (3 successes negates), and blindness (save Dexterity negates) and banishment to another plane (save Wisdom negates and ends the blindness) at the start of the next turn
Produce Flame (D0 Conj): (Action) Emits bright light in a 20' radius for 10 min; allows a R60' ranged spell attack each turn that inflicts 3d8 HP fire
Programmed Illusion (B6 Illu): (Action) R120' Creates a 30' cube moving illusion (contact or Investigation detects) that appears when triggered and continues for 5 min, with a 10 min pause between triggers
Programmed Illusion (W6 Illu): (Action) R120' Creates a 30' cube moving illusion (contact or Investigation detects) that appears when triggered and continues for 5 min, with a 10 min pause between triggers
Project Image (B7 Illu): (Action) R500 miles Self can see, hear, and speak through an illusory double (contact or Investigation detects) created in a familiar place for concentration up to 1 day or until it suffers damage
Project Image (W7 Illu): (Action) R500 miles Self can see, hear, and speak through an illusory double (contact or Investigation detects) created in a familiar place for concentration up to 1 day or until it suffers damage
Protection From Energy (C3 Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Energy (D3 Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Energy (R3 Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Energy (S3 Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Energy (W3 Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Evil And Good (C1 Abju): (Action) Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Evil And Good (D1 Abju): (Action) Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Evil And Good (K1 Abju): (Action) Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Evil And Good (P1 Abju): (Action) Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Evil And Good (W1 Abju): (Action) Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Poison (C2 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Protection From Poison (D2 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Protection From Poison (P2 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Protection From Poison (R2 Abju): (Action) Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Purify Food And Drink (C1 Tran): (Action) R10' Removes poison and rot from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Purify Food And Drink (D1 Tran): (Action) R10' Removes poison and rot from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Purify Food And Drink (P1 Tran): (Action) R10' Removes poison and rot from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Raise Dead (B5 Necr): (Hour) Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Raise Dead (C5 Necr): (Hour) Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Raise Dead (P5 Necr): (Hour) Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Rary's Telepathic Bond (B5 Divi): (Action) R30' 8 willing targets can communicate telepathically for 1 hr [R]
Rary's Telepathic Bond (W5 Divi): (Action) R30' 8 willing targets can communicate telepathically for 1 hr [R]
Ray Of Enfeeblement (K2 Necr): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d8 HP damage from attacks (save Constitution inflicts disadvantage on the first attack before the start of the next turn only; additional saves each rd ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Ray Of Enfeeblement (W2 Necr): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d8 HP damage from attacks (save Constitution inflicts disadvantage on the first attack before the start of the next turn only; additional saves each rd ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Ray Of Frost (S0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Frost (W0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Ray Of Sickness (S1 Necr): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned until the end of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Ray Of Sickness (W1 Necr): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned until the end of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Regenerate (B7 Tran): (Minute) Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and regrows severed parts after 2 min
Regenerate (C7 Tran): (Minute) Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and regrows severed parts after 2 min
Regenerate (D7 Tran): (Minute) Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and regrows severed parts after 2 min
Reincarnate (D5 Necr): (Hour) Resurrects the willing soul of a touched 10-day-old corpse in a new body
Remove Curse (C3 Abju): (Action) Ends all curses affecting a touched creature or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Remove Curse (K3 Abju): (Action) Ends all curses affecting a touched creature or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Remove Curse (P3 Abju): (Action) Ends all curses affecting a touched creature or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Remove Curse (W3 Abju): (Action) Ends all curses affecting a touched creature or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Resistance (C0 Abju): (Action) Touched reduces by 1d4 HP any damage taken from a choice of acid, bludgeoning, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, piercing, poison, radiant, slashing, or thunder for concentration up to 1 min
Resistance (D0 Abju): (Action) Touched reduces by 1d4 HP any damage taken from a choice of acid, bludgeoning, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, piercing, poison, radiant, slashing, or thunder for concentration up to 1 min
Resurrection (B7 Necr): (Hour) Restores life with full hit points to and removes poisons, wounds, and maims from a willing touched 100-year-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest; use on a corpse dead 365 days or more inflicts on self loss of spellcasting and disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and saves until the next long rest
Resurrection (C7 Necr): (Hour) Restores life with full hit points to and removes poisons, wounds, and maims from a willing touched 100-year-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest; use on a corpse dead 365 days or more inflicts on self loss of spellcasting and disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and saves until the next long rest
Reverse Gravity (D7 Tran): (Action) R100' Items in a 50' radius, 100' high cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Reverse Gravity (S7 Tran): (Action) R100' Items in a 50' radius, 100' high cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Reverse Gravity (W7 Tran): (Action) R100' Items in a 50' radius, 100' high cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Revivify (C3 Necr): (Action) Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-min-old corpse
Revivify (D3 Necr): (Action) Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-min-old corpse
Revivify (P3 Necr): (Action) Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-min-old corpse
Revivify (R3 Necr): (Action) Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-min-old corpse
Rope Trick (W2 Tran): (Action) Touched rope leads to an extradimensional space with room for 8 creatures for 1 hr
Sacred Flame (C0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Inflicts 3d8 HP radiant (save Dexterity negates), ignoring 1/2 and 3/4 cover
Sanctuary (C1 Abju): (Bonus) R30' Foes of the target cannot attack it (save Wisdom negates) for 1 min; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends
Scorching Ray (K2 [The Fiend] Evoc): (Action) R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire (+Level gives +1 ranged attack)
Scorching Ray (S2 Evoc): (Action) R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire (+Level gives +1 ranged attack)
Scorching Ray (W2 Evoc): (Action) R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire (+Level gives +1 ranged attack)
Scrying (B5 Divi): (10 Minutes) Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Scrying (C5 Divi): (10 Minutes) Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Scrying (D5 Divi): (10 Minutes) Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Scrying (K5 Divi): (10 Minutes) Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Scrying (W5 Divi): (10 Minutes) Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Searing Smite (P1 Evoc): (Bonus) Cast after a successful melee attack, inflicts +1d6 HP fire, plus 1d6 HP fire each rd for 1 min (save Constitution each rd ends) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP initial and per rd)
See Invisibility (B2 Divi): (Action) Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
See Invisibility (S2 Divi): (Action) Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
See Invisibility (W2 Divi): (Action) Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
Seeming (B5 Illu): (Action) R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; contact or Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Seeming (S5 Illu): (Action) R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; contact or Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Seeming (W5 Illu): (Action) R30' Changes the appearance of targets (save Charisma negates; contact or Investigation detects) for 8 hr
Sending (B3 Evoc): (Action) Self can exchange a pair of 25-word messages with a familiar target
Sending (C3 Evoc): (Action) Self can exchange a pair of 25-word messages with a familiar target
Sending (W3 Evoc): (Action) Self can exchange a pair of 25-word messages with a familiar target
Sequester (W7 Tran): (Action) Touched object or willing creature becomes invisible and hidden from divination and enters a state of suspended animation until a specified trigger
Shapechange (D9 Tran): (Action) Allows self to polymorph repeatedly into familiar living creatures of equal or lesser CR, initially gaining temporary hit points of the first creature, for concentration up to 1 hr
Shapechange (W9 Tran): (Action) Allows self to polymorph repeatedly into familiar living creatures of equal or lesser CR, initially gaining temporary hit points of the first creature, for concentration up to 1 hr
Shatter (B2 Evoc): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; constructs have disadvantage) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Shatter (S2 Evoc): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; constructs have disadvantage) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Shatter (W2 Evoc): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts 3d8 HP thunder (save Constitution half; constructs have disadvantage) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Shield (S1 Abju): (Reaction) Cast when taking damage, gives self +5 Armor Class and immunity to Magic Missile until the start of the next turn
Shield (W1 Abju): (Reaction) Cast when taking damage, gives self +5 Armor Class and immunity to Magic Missile until the start of the next turn
Shield Of Faith (C1 Abju): (Bonus) R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Shield Of Faith (P1 Abju): (Bonus) R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Shillelagh (D0 Tran): (Bonus) Held club gains +7 attacks that inflict 1d12+2 HP of a choice of force or weapon damage for 1 min
Shining Smite (P2 Tran): (Bonus) Cast after a successful melee attack, inflicts +2d6 HP radiant and causes the target to emit a 5' bright light, giving its foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Shocking Grasp (S0 Evoc): (Action) Touch inflicts 3d8 HP lightning and loss of opportunity attacks until the target's next turn
Shocking Grasp (W0 Evoc): (Action) Touch inflicts 3d8 HP lightning and loss of opportunity attacks until the target's next turn
Silence (B2 Illu): (Action) R120' 20' radius blocks sound for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Silence (C2 Illu): (Action) R120' 20' radius blocks sound for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Silence (R2 Illu): (Action) R120' 20' radius blocks sound for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Silent Image (B1 Illu): (Action) R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Silent Image (S1 Illu): (Action) R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Silent Image (W1 Illu): (Action) R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Simulacrum (W7 Illu): (12 Hours) Uses snow to create an obedient copy of a nearby target creature with half its hit points
Sleep (B1 Ench): (Action) R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; damage or shaking awakens
Sleep (S1 Ench): (Action) R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; damage or shaking awakens
Sleep (W1 Ench): (Action) R60' Each target in a 5' radius becomes incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) until the end of its next turn, then unconscious (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; damage or shaking awakens
Sleet Storm (D3 Conj): (Action) R150' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, douses exposed flames, becomes difficult terrain, and inflicts prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Sleet Storm (S3 Conj): (Action) R150' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, douses exposed flames, becomes difficult terrain, and inflicts prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Sleet Storm (W3 Conj): (Action) R150' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, douses exposed flames, becomes difficult terrain, and inflicts prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Slow (B3 Tran): (Action) R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action or attack per turn, and a 25% chance of somatic spell failure (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Slow (S3 Tran): (Action) R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action or attack per turn, and a 25% chance of somatic spell failure (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Slow (W3 Tran): (Action) R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action or attack per turn, and a 25% chance of somatic spell failure (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Sorcerous Burst (S0 Evoc): (Action) R120' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, psychic, or thunder; rolled 8s on the damage each inflict +1d8 HP, to a maximum of +2d8 HP
Spare The Dying (C0 Necr): (Action) R60' Target creature with 0 hit points becomes stable
Spare The Dying (D0 Necr): (Action) R60' Target creature with 0 hit points becomes stable
Speak With Animals (B1 Divi): (Action) Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (D1 Divi): (Action) Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (K1 Divi): (Action) Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (R1 Divi): (Action) Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Animals (R1 [Druidic] Divi): (Action) Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Dead (B3 Necr): (Action) R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Speak With Dead (C3 Necr): (Action) R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Speak With Dead (W3 Necr): (Action) R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Speak With Plants (B3 Tran): (Action) Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius, turning difficult terrain from plant growth into normal terrain or vice versa, for 10 min
Speak With Plants (D3 Tran): (Action) Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius, turning difficult terrain from plant growth into normal terrain or vice versa, for 10 min
Speak With Plants (R3 Tran): (Action) Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius, turning difficult terrain from plant growth into normal terrain or vice versa, for 10 min
Spider Climb (K2 Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Spider Climb (S2 Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Spider Climb (W2 Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Spike Growth (D2 Tran): (Action) R150' Camouflaged spikes in a 20' radius inflict difficult terrain and 2d4 HP piercing per 5' movement for concentration up to 10 min
Spike Growth (R2 Tran): (Action) R150' Camouflaged spikes in a 20' radius inflict difficult terrain and 2d4 HP piercing per 5' movement for concentration up to 10 min
Spirit Guardians (C3 Conj): (Action) 15' radius inflicts 3d8 HP necrotic or radiant (save Wisdom half) and half Speed on non-designated creatures for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Spiritual Weapon (C2 Evoc): (Bonus) R60' Creates a spectral weapon that inflicts 1d8+2 HP force and can move 20' and attack as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Staggering Smite (P4 Ench): (Bonus) Cast after a successful melee attack, inflicts +4d6 HP psychic and stunned until the end of the next turn (save Wisdom negates stunned) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Starry Wisp (B0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP radiant and a dim glow until the end of the next turn
Starry Wisp (D0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Ranged spell inflicts 3d8 HP radiant and a dim glow until the end of the next turn
Steel Wind Strike (R5 Conj): (Action) R30' Melee spell attack inflicts 6d10 HP force on each of 5 targets and teleports self to a spot adjacent to one of them
Steel Wind Strike (W5 Conj): (Action) R30' Melee spell attack inflicts 6d10 HP force on each of 5 targets and teleports self to a spot adjacent to one of them
Stinking Cloud (B3 Conj): (Action) R90' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured and inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stinking Cloud (K3 [The Fiend] Conj): (Action) R90' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured and inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stinking Cloud (S3 Conj): (Action) R90' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured and inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stinking Cloud (W3 Conj): (Action) R90' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured and inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stone Shape (C4 Tran): (Action) Reshapes touched 5' cube of stone
Stone Shape (D4 Tran): (Action) Reshapes touched 5' cube of stone
Stone Shape (W4 Tran): (Action) Reshapes touched 5' cube of stone
Stoneskin (D4 Tran): (Action) Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Stoneskin (R4 Tran): (Action) Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Stoneskin (S4 Tran): (Action) Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Stoneskin (W4 Tran): (Action) Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Storm Of Vengeance (D9 Conj): (Action) 300' radius within 1 mile inflicts 2d6 HP thunder and deafness (save Constitution negates), then 4d6 HP acid, then 10d6 HP lightning on 6 targets (save Dexterity half), then 2d6 HP bludgeoning, then 1d6 HP cold per rd, heavy obscurement, difficult terrain, and no ranged attacks for concentration up to 1 min
Suggestion (B2 Ench): (Action) R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Suggestion (K2 Ench): (Action) R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Suggestion (S2 Ench): (Action) R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Suggestion (W2 Ench): (Action) R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Summon Aberration (K4 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient aberrant spirit (Armor Class 15; 40 hit points; move 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type beholderkin (R150' inflicts 1d8+7 HP psychic; fly 30'), slaad (inflicts 1d10+7 HP slashing and negates healing for 1 rd; regenerates 5 hit points per rd), or mind flayer (inflicts 1d8+7 HP psychic, plus 2d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) in a 5' radius) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Aberration (W4 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient aberrant spirit (Armor Class 15; 40 hit points; move 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type beholderkin (R150' inflicts 1d8+7 HP psychic; fly 30'), slaad (inflicts 1d10+7 HP slashing and negates healing for 1 rd; regenerates 5 hit points per rd), or mind flayer (inflicts 1d8+7 HP psychic, plus 2d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) in a 5' radius) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Beast (D2 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient bestial spirit (Armor Class 13; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; inflicts 1d8+6 piercing) of air (20 hit points; fly 60'; does not provoke opportunity attacks when flying out of reach), land (30 hit points; move and climb 30'; has advantage on attacks when within 5' of an ally), or water (30 hit points; swim 30'; water-breathing; has advantage on attacks when within 5' of an ally) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 5, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Beast (R2 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient bestial spirit (Armor Class 13; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; inflicts 1d8+6 piercing) of air (20 hit points; fly 60'; does not provoke opportunity attacks when flying out of reach), land (30 hit points; move and climb 30'; has advantage on attacks when within 5' of an ally), or water (30 hit points; swim 30'; water-breathing; has advantage on attacks when within 5' of an ally) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 5, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Celestial (C5 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient celestial spirit (40 hit points; move 30' and fly 40'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; touch restores 2d8+5 hit points once per day) of type avenger (Armor Class 16; R150' inflicts 2d6+7 HP radiant) or defender (Armor Class 18; inflicts 1d10+8 HP radiant and gives 1d10 temporary hit points to a creature within 10') for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, attack damage by 1, and healing by 1)
Summon Celestial (P5 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient celestial spirit (40 hit points; move 30' and fly 40'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; touch restores 2d8+5 hit points once per day) of type avenger (Armor Class 16; R150' inflicts 2d6+7 HP radiant) or defender (Armor Class 18; inflicts 1d10+8 HP radiant and gives 1d10 temporary hit points to a creature within 10') for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, attack damage by 1, and healing by 1)
Summon Construct (W4 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient construct spirit (Armor Class 17; 40 hit points; move 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; slam inflicts 1d8+8 bludgeoning) of clay (attacks an adjacent attacker or moves 15' as a reaction to damage), metal (inflicts 1d10 HP fire on adjacent melee attackers), or stone (can inflict half Speed and loss of reactions (save Wisdom negates) on creatures within 10') for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 15, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Dragon (W5 Conj): (Action) R60' Summons an obedient draconic spirit (Armor Class 19; 50 hit points; move 30', fly 60', and swim 30'; 30' blindsight and 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; inflict 1d6 + 9 HP piercing; a breath weapon that inflicts 2d6 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison in a 30' cone; resistance to the same damage type) and gives self the same resistance, for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, number of attacks by 1 per 2 levels, and piercing damage by 1)
Summon Elemental (D4 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient elemental spirit (Armor Class 15; 50 hit points; move 40'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; slam inflicts 1d10+8 HP) of air (fly 40'; can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts lightning), earth (burrow 40'; slam inflicts bludgeoning), fire (can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts fire), or water (swim 40'; can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts cold) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Elemental (R4 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient elemental spirit (Armor Class 15; 50 hit points; move 40'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; slam inflicts 1d10+8 HP) of air (fly 40'; can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts lightning), earth (burrow 40'; slam inflicts bludgeoning), fire (can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts fire), or water (swim 40'; can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts cold) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Elemental (W4 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient elemental spirit (Armor Class 15; 50 hit points; move 40'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; slam inflicts 1d10+8 HP) of air (fly 40'; can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts lightning), earth (burrow 40'; slam inflicts bludgeoning), fire (can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts fire), or water (swim 40'; can move through a 1" gap without squeezing; slam inflicts cold) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Fey (D3 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient fey spirit (Armor Class 15; 30 hit points; move 40', fly 40', and can teleport 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; fey blade inflicts 2d6+6 HP force), of type fuming (has advantage on the next attack in the same turn after teleporting), mirthful (can charm 1 creature (save Wisdom negates) within 10' after teleporting for 1 min or until damaged), or tricksy (can create a 10' cube of darkness within 5' after teleporting until the end of its next turn) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and damage by 1)
Summon Fey (K3 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient fey spirit (Armor Class 15; 30 hit points; move 40', fly 40', and can teleport 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; fey blade inflicts 2d6+6 HP force), of type fuming (has advantage on the next attack in the same turn after teleporting), mirthful (can charm 1 creature (save Wisdom negates) within 10' after teleporting for 1 min or until damaged), or tricksy (can create a 10' cube of darkness within 5' after teleporting until the end of its next turn) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and damage by 1)
Summon Fey (R3 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient fey spirit (Armor Class 15; 30 hit points; move 40', fly 40', and can teleport 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; fey blade inflicts 2d6+6 HP force), of type fuming (has advantage on the next attack in the same turn after teleporting), mirthful (can charm 1 creature (save Wisdom negates) within 10' after teleporting for 1 min or until damaged), or tricksy (can create a 10' cube of darkness within 5' after teleporting until the end of its next turn) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and damage by 1)
Summon Fey (W3 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient fey spirit (Armor Class 15; 30 hit points; move 40', fly 40', and can teleport 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level; fey blade inflicts 2d6+6 HP force), of type fuming (has advantage on the next attack in the same turn after teleporting), mirthful (can charm 1 creature (save Wisdom negates) within 10' after teleporting for 1 min or until damaged), or tricksy (can create a 10' cube of darkness within 5' after teleporting until the end of its next turn) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and damage by 1)
Summon Fiend (K6 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient fiendish spirit (Armor Class 18; move 40'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type demon (50 hit points; climb 40'; bite inflicts 1d12+9 HP necrotic; death or end of spell inflicts 2d10+6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) in a 10' radius), devil (40 hit points; fly 60'; can see in magical darkness; R150' flame inflicts 2d6+9 fire) or yugoloth (60 hit points; claws inflict 1d8+9 slashing and allow teleporting 30' afterward) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 15, and damage by 1)
Summon Fiend (W6 Conj): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient fiendish spirit (Armor Class 18; move 40'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type demon (50 hit points; climb 40'; bite inflicts 1d12+9 HP necrotic; death or end of spell inflicts 2d10+6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) in a 10' radius), devil (40 hit points; fly 60'; can see in magical darkness; R150' flame inflicts 2d6+9 fire) or yugoloth (60 hit points; claws inflict 1d8+9 slashing and allow teleporting 30' afterward) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 15, and damage by 1)
Summon Undead (K3 Necr): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient undead spirit (Armor Class 14; move 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type ghostly (30 hit points; fly 40'; moves through creatures and objects; inflicts 1d8+6 HP necrotic and frightened until the end of the target's next turn (save Wisdom HP only)), putrid (30 hit points; 5' radius inflicts poisoned until the start of the target's next turn (save Constitution negates); claws inflict 1d6+6 slashing, plus paralysis on a poisoned target until the end of the target's next turn (save Constitution negates)), or skeletal (20 hit points; R150' inflicts 2d4+6 HP necrotic) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Summon Undead (W3 Necr): (Action) R90' Summons an obedient undead spirit (Armor Class 14; move 30'; 60' darkvision; multiattack equal to half the spell level) of type ghostly (30 hit points; fly 40'; moves through creatures and objects; inflicts 1d8+6 HP necrotic and frightened until the end of the target's next turn (save Wisdom HP only)), putrid (30 hit points; 5' radius inflicts poisoned until the start of the target's next turn (save Constitution negates); claws inflict 1d6+6 slashing, plus paralysis on a poisoned target until the end of the target's next turn (save Constitution negates)), or skeletal (20 hit points; R150' inflicts 2d4+6 HP necrotic) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the Armor Class by 1, hit points by 10, and attack damage by 1)
Sunbeam (C6 Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 30' bright sunlight, and a 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd, for concentration up to 1 min
Sunbeam (D6 Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 30' bright sunlight, and a 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd, for concentration up to 1 min
Sunbeam (S6 Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 30' bright sunlight, and a 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd, for concentration up to 1 min
Sunbeam (W6 Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 30' bright sunlight, and a 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd, for concentration up to 1 min
Sunburst (C8 Evoc): (Action) R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Sunburst (D8 Evoc): (Action) R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Sunburst (S8 Evoc): (Action) R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Sunburst (W8 Evoc): (Action) R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Swift Quiver (R5 Tran): (Bonus) Self bow or crossbow automatically reloads with magical ammo, allowing two ranged attacks as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min
Symbol (B7 Abju): (Minute) Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or damaged (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Symbol (C7 Abju): (Minute) Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or damaged (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Symbol (D7 Abju): (Minute) Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or damaged (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Symbol (W7 Abju): (Minute) Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or damaged (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Synaptic Static (B5 Ench): (Action) R120' Creatures in a 20' radius suffer 8d6 HP psychic and -1d6 attacks, ability checks, and concentration checks for 1 min (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Synaptic Static (K5 Ench): (Action) R120' Creatures in a 20' radius suffer 8d6 HP psychic and -1d6 attacks, ability checks, and concentration checks for 1 min (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Synaptic Static (S5 Ench): (Action) R120' Creatures in a 20' radius suffer 8d6 HP psychic and -1d6 attacks, ability checks, and concentration checks for 1 min (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Synaptic Static (W5 Ench): (Action) R120' Creatures in a 20' radius suffer 8d6 HP psychic and -1d6 attacks, ability checks, and concentration checks for 1 min (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves each rd end)
Tasha's Bubbling Cauldron (K6 Conj): (Action) Conjured cauldron produces 2 doses of a choice of common or uncommon potion within 10 min
Tasha's Bubbling Cauldron (W6 Conj): (Action) Conjured cauldron produces 3 doses of a choice of common or uncommon potion within 10 min
Tasha's Hideous Laughter (B1 Ench): (Action) R30' Inflicts prone, incapacitated, and laughing (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd and in response to damage end, with damage giving advantage on the save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Tasha's Hideous Laughter (K1 Ench): (Action) R30' Inflicts prone, incapacitated, and laughing (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd and in response to damage end, with damage giving advantage on the save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Tasha's Hideous Laughter (W1 Ench): (Action) R30' Inflicts prone, incapacitated, and laughing (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd and in response to damage end, with damage giving advantage on the save) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Telekinesis (S5 Tran): (Action) R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Telekinesis (W5 Tran): (Action) R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Telepathy (W8 Evoc): (Action) Self can communicate telepathically with a willing familiar target for 24 hr
Teleport (B7 Conj): (Action) R10' Teleports an unattended Large or smaller object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleport (S7 Conj): (Action) R10' Teleports an unattended Large or smaller object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleport (W7 Conj): (Action) R10' Teleports an unattended Large or smaller object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleportation Circle (B5 Conj): (Minute) R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Teleportation Circle (K5 Conj): (Minute) R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Teleportation Circle (S5 Conj): (Minute) R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Teleportation Circle (W5 Conj): (Minute) R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Tenser's Floating Disk (W1 Conj): (Action) R30' Creates a 3'x1" force disk that floats 3' above the ground 20' behind self and holds 500 lbs for 1 hr [R]
Thaumaturgy (C0 Tran): (Action) R30' Creates a minor magic effect: a booming voice for 1 min; a modification of flames for 1 min; harmless ground tremors for 1 min; an illusory sound; movement of a door or window; a change in eye appearance for 1 min
Thorn Whip (D0 Tran): (Action) R30' Melee spell attack inflicts 3d6 HP piercing and pulls a Large or smaller target 10'
Thunderclap (B0 Evoc): (Action) 5' emanation inflicts 3d6 HP thunder
Thunderclap (D0 Evoc): (Action) 5' emanation inflicts 3d6 HP thunder
Thunderclap (K0 Evoc): (Action) 5' emanation inflicts 3d6 HP thunder
Thunderclap (S0 Evoc): (Action) 5' emanation inflicts 3d6 HP thunder
Thunderclap (W0 Evoc): (Action) 5' emanation inflicts 3d6 HP thunder
Thunderous Smite (P1 Evoc): (Bonus) Cast after a successful melee attack, inflicts +2d6 HP thunder, a 10' push, and knocked prone (save Strength negates push and prone)
Thunderwave (B1 Evoc): (Action) 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Thunderwave (D1 Evoc): (Action) 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Thunderwave (S1 Evoc): (Action) 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Thunderwave (W1 Evoc): (Action) 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Time Stop (S9 Tran): (Action) Self can take 1d4+1 turns while no time passes for others; affecting another creature or moving more than 1000' away ends
Time Stop (W9 Tran): (Action) Self can take 1d4+1 turns while no time passes for others; affecting another creature or moving more than 1000' away ends
Toll The Dead (C0 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 3d8 HP necrotic, or 3d12 HP necrotic if previously damaged (save Wisdom negates)
Toll The Dead (K0 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 3d8 HP necrotic, or 3d12 HP necrotic if previously damaged (save Wisdom negates)
Toll The Dead (W0 Necr): (Action) R60' Target suffers 3d8 HP necrotic, or 3d12 HP necrotic if previously damaged (save Wisdom negates)
Tongues (B3 Divi): (Action) Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Tongues (C3 Divi): (Action) Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Tongues (K3 Divi): (Action) Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Tongues (S3 Divi): (Action) Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Tongues (W3 Divi): (Action) Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Transport Via Plants (D6 Conj): (Action) R10' Allows creatures to use 5' of movement to teleport any distance from the targeted Large plant to a specified familiar Large plant for 1 min
Tree Stride (D5 Conj): (Action) Allows self to use 10' of movement to step into and out of a pair of similar trees within 500' once per turn for concentration up to 1 min
Tree Stride (R5 Conj): (Action) Allows self to use 10' of movement to step into and out of a pair of similar trees within 500' once per turn for concentration up to 1 min
True Polymorph (B9 Tran): (Action) R30' Transforms the target creature into another creature or object (save Wisdom negates), or the target object into a creature, for concentration up to 1 hr; concentrating for a full hr makes the change permanent
True Polymorph (K9 Tran): (Action) R30' Transforms the target creature into another creature or object (save Wisdom negates), or the target object into a creature, for concentration up to 1 hr; concentrating for a full hr makes the change permanent
True Polymorph (W9 Tran): (Action) R30' Transforms the target creature into another creature or object (save Wisdom negates), or the target object into a creature, for concentration up to 1 hr; concentrating for a full hr makes the change permanent
True Resurrection (C9 Necr): (Hour) Restores life and full hit points to and removes all diseases, poisons, wounds, maims, and curses from a willing touched corpse or named creature dead up to 200 years
True Resurrection (D9 Necr): (Hour) Restores life and full hit points to and removes all diseases, poisons, wounds, maims, and curses from a willing touched corpse or named creature dead up to 200 years
True Seeing (B6 Divi): (Action) Touched gains 120' Truesight for 1 hr
True Seeing (C6 Divi): (Action) Touched gains 120' Truesight for 1 hr
True Seeing (K6 Divi): (Action) Touched gains 120' Truesight for 1 hr
True Seeing (S6 Divi): (Action) Touched gains 120' Truesight for 1 hr
True Seeing (W6 Divi): (Action) Touched gains 120' Truesight for 1 hr
True Strike (B0 Divi): (Action) Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +7 attack bonus and inflicts +2d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
True Strike (K0 Divi): (Action) Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +7 attack bonus and inflicts +2d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
True Strike (S0 Divi): (Action) Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +7 attack bonus and inflicts +2d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
True Strike (W0 Divi): (Action) Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +8 attack bonus and inflicts +2d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
Tsunami (D8 Conj): (Minute) R1 mile 300'x300'x50' wall of water inflicts 6d10 HP bludgeoning (save Strength half); it moves away 50' per rd, reducing its height by 50' and its damage by 1d10 HP each rd, for concentration up to 6 rd
Unseen Servant (B1 Conj): (Action) R60' Creates an invisible force with Armor Class 10, 1 hit point, and Strength 2; a bonus action each rd can move it 15' and use it to perform simple tasks for 1 hr or until it is damaged [R]
Unseen Servant (K1 Conj): (Action) R60' Creates an invisible force with Armor Class 10, 1 hit point, and Strength 2; a bonus action each rd can move it 15' and use it to perform simple tasks for 1 hr or until it is damaged [R]
Unseen Servant (W1 Conj): (Action) R60' Creates an invisible force with Armor Class 10, 1 hit point, and Strength 2; a bonus action each rd can move it 15' and use it to perform simple tasks for 1 hr or until it is damaged [R]
Vampiric Touch (K3 Necr): (Action) Touch inflicts 3d6 HP necrotic, and self regains half as many hit points, for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Vampiric Touch (S3 Necr): (Action) Touch inflicts 3d6 HP necrotic, and self regains half as many hit points, for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Vampiric Touch (W3 Necr): (Action) Touch inflicts 3d6 HP necrotic, and self regains half as many hit points, for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Vicious Mockery (B0 Ench): (Action) R60' Target suffers 3d6 HP psychic and disadvantage on its next attack before the end of its next turn (save Wisdom negates)
Vitriolic Sphere (S4 Evoc): (Action) R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d4 HP acid, then 5d4 HP acid at the end of each affected creature's next turn (save Dexterity half initial HP only) (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP initial)
Vitriolic Sphere (W4 Evoc): (Action) R150' 20' radius inflicts 10d4 HP acid, then 5d4 HP acid at the end of each affected creature's next turn (save Dexterity half initial HP only) (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP initial)
Wall Of Fire (D4 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Wall Of Fire (K4 [The Fiend] Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Wall Of Fire (S4 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Wall Of Fire (W4 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Wall Of Force (W5 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x1/4" impassable force panels or a 10' radius impassible force dome or globe for concentration up to 10 min; the effect extends into the ethereal plane
Wall Of Ice (W6 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x1' panels or a 10' radius dome or globe, with Armor Class 12 and 30 hit points per section, that inflicts 10d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) initially and, if broken, 5d6 HP cold to creatures passing through (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +2d6 HP initial and +1d6 HP when passing)
Wall Of Stone (D5 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity allows using a reaction to avoid entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
