Wall Of Stone (S5 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity allows using a reaction to avoid entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Wall Of Stone (W5 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity allows using a reaction to avoid entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Wall Of Thorns (D6 Conj): (Action) R120' Creates a 60'x10'x5' wall or a 20'x20'x5' ring that inflicts 7d8 HP piercing (save Dexterity half) initially, plus 1/4 Speed and 7d8 HP slashing to creatures passing through (save Dexterity half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Warding Bond (C2 Abju): (Action) Willing touched gains +1 Armor Class, +1 saves, and resistance to all damage, and any damage to the target also affects self, for 1 hr; separation by more than 60' or casting again ends
Warding Bond (P2 Abju): (Action) Willing touched gains +1 Armor Class, +1 saves, and resistance to all damage, and any damage to the target also affects self, for 1 hr; separation by more than 60' or casting again ends
Water Breathing (D3 Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Breathing (R3 Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Breathing (S3 Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Breathing (W3 Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Walk (C3 Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr, entering a liquid only from a fall or by using a bonus action [R]
Water Walk (D3 Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr, entering a liquid only from a fall or by using a bonus action [R]
Water Walk (R3 Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr, entering a liquid only from a fall or by using a bonus action [R]
Water Walk (S3 Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr, entering a liquid only from a fall or by using a bonus action [R]
Web (S2 Conj): (Action) R60' 20' cube inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates; Athletics frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Web (W2 Conj): (Action) R60' 20' cube inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates; Athletics frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Weird (K9 Illu): (Action) R120' 30' radius inflicts frightened, 10d10 HP psychic initially, and 5d10 HP psychic each rd (save Wisdom half initial HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Weird (W9 Illu): (Action) R120' 30' radius inflicts frightened, 10d10 HP psychic initially, and 5d10 HP psychic each rd (save Wisdom half initial HP only; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Wind Walk (D6 Tran): (Minute) R30' Self and 10 willing others can become gaseous, gaining a 300' fly Speed and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, at will for 8 hr; converting to or from gas inflicts stunned for 1 min
Wind Wall (D3 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates a 50'x15'x1' area that inflicts 4d8 HP bludgeoning (save Strength half) and deflects lightweight creatures, objects, and projectiles for concentration up to 1 min
Wind Wall (R3 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates a 50'x15'x1' area that inflicts 4d8 HP bludgeoning (save Strength half) and deflects lightweight creatures, objects, and projectiles for concentration up to 1 min
Wish (S9 Conj): (Action) Mimics an 8th level spell or alters reality with few limits; casting to alter reality reduces Strength to 3 for 2d4 days, causes later spellcasting before a long rest to inflict 1d10 HP necrotic per spell level, and carries a 33% chance of inflicting permanent inability to cast Wish in the future
Wish (W9 Conj): (Action) Mimics an 8th level spell or alters reality with few limits; casting to alter reality reduces Strength to 3 for 2d4 days, causes later spellcasting before a long rest to inflict 1d10 HP necrotic per spell level, and carries a 33% chance of inflicting permanent inability to cast Wish in the future
Witch Bolt (K1 Evoc): (Action) R30' Ranged spell inflicts 2d12 HP lightning and allows bonus actions to inflict 1d12 HP lightning on the target each rd even after an initial miss for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d12 HP initial)
Witch Bolt (S1 Evoc): (Action) R30' Ranged spell inflicts 2d12 HP lightning and allows bonus actions to inflict 1d12 HP lightning on the target each rd even after an initial miss for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d12 HP initial)
Witch Bolt (W1 Evoc): (Action) R30' Ranged spell inflicts 2d12 HP lightning and allows bonus actions to inflict 1d12 HP lightning on the target each rd even after an initial miss for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +1d12 HP initial)
Word Of Radiance (C0 Evoc): (Action) R5' Targets suffer 3d6 HP radiant (save Constitution negates)
Word Of Recall (C6 Conj): (Action) R5' Teleports self and 5 others to a prepared location
Wrathful Smite (P1 Evoc): (Bonus) Cast after a successful melee attack, inflicts +1d6 HP necrotic and frightened for 1 min (save Wisdom negates frightened; additional saves each rd end) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Yolanda's Regal Presence (B5 Ench): (Action) 10' radius inflicts 4d6 HP psychic, knocked prone, and a 10' push (save Wisdom half HP only) on targets for concentration up to 1 min
Yolanda's Regal Presence (W5 Ench): (Action) 10' radius inflicts 4d6 HP psychic, knocked prone, and a 10' push (save Wisdom half HP only) on targets for concentration up to 1 min
Zone Of Truth (B2 Ench): (Action) R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Zone Of Truth (C2 Ench): (Action) R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Zone Of Truth (P2 Ench): (Action) R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Magic Notes:
Blessed Warrior: Knows 2 Cleric cantrips; can replace 1 of them when gaining a Paladin level
Eldritch Invocations: 3 selections
Magician: Knows +1 Druid cantrip
Arcane Recovery: Can recover 1 spell slot level (level 5 maximum) at the end of a short rest once per long rest
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 2 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Eldritch Spear: Increases the range of a chosen damaging Warlock cantrip by 60'
Favored Enemy: Can cast Hunter's Mark without expending a spell slot 2 times per long rest
Font Of Magic: Can use 2 sorcery points per long rest, convert spell slots to sorcery points, and use a bonus action to convert sorcery points to a spell slot
Innate Sorcery: Can use a bonus action to gain +1 spell DC and advantage on spell attacks for 1 min 2 times per long rest
Lay On Hands: Touch can use bonus actions to heal 10 hit points per long rest; can use 5 hit points' worth to remove a poisoned condition
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Magical Cunning: Can use a 1 min process to regain 1 Pact Magic spell slot once per long rest
Pact Magic: Can cast spells from the Warlock spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Pact Of The Blade: Can use a bonus action to conjure a bonded simple or martial pact weapon or to bond with a touched magic weapon and gain proficiency with it; it can be used as a spellcasting focus, and its Charisma-based attacks inflict a choice of necrotic, psychic, radiant, or normal weapon damage; moving 5' away from the weapon for 1 min ends the bond
Paladin's Smite: Can cast Divine Smite without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Repelling Blast: Can inflict a 10' push on a Large or smaller target with a successful attack using a chosen Warlock cantrip
Ritual Adept: Can cast spells marked with [R] as rituals directly from spellbook
Seeking Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll a failed spell attack; can be used in addition to another Metamagic option
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the wizard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Subtle Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to cast a spell without somatic, material, or verbal components
Wild Companion: Can expend a spell slot or a use of Wild Shape to summon a Fey familiar using Find Familiar; the familiar remains present until the next long rest
Wild Shape: Can use a bonus action to transform into a CR 1/4 (non-flying) creature with 2 temporary hit points for 1 hr 2 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Notes
Validation Errors:
Expertise Allocation: 4 available vs. 2 allocated
Skill And Tool Proficiency Allocation: 23 available vs. 22 allocated
Skill Proficiency Allocation: 19 available vs. 18 allocated
